year.1968: is the year that Alexander Dubček comes to power in Czechoslovakia, effectively beginning the "Prague Spring".
year.1925: is the year that Nellie Tayloe Ross of Wyoming becomes the first female governor in the United States.
year.1919: is the year that The German Workers' Party, which would become the Nazi Party, is founded in Munich.
year.1895: is the year that Dreyfus affair: French army officer Alfred Dreyfus is stripped of his rank and sentenced to life imprisonment on Devil's Island.
year.1875: is the year that The Palais Garnier, one of the most famous opera houses in the world, is inaugurated in Paris.
year.1757: is the year that Louis XV of France survives an assassination attempt by Robert-François Damiens, who becomes the last person to be executed in France by drawing and quartering (the traditional form of capital punishment used for regicides).
year.1675: is the year that Battle of Colmar: The French army defeats forces from Austria and Brandenburg.
year.1477: is the year that Battle of Nancy: Charles the Bold is defeated and killed in a conflict with René II, Duke of Lorraine; Burgundy subsequently becomes part of France.
year.2021: is the year that Supporters of U.S. president Donald Trump storm the United States Capitol Building to disrupt certification of the 2020 presidential election, resulting in four deaths and evacuation of the U.S. Congress.
year.2012: is the year that Twenty-six people are killed and 63 wounded when a suicide bomber blows himself up at a police station in Damascus.
year.1974: is the year that In response to the 1973 oil crisis, daylight saving time commences nearly four months early in the United States.
year.1839: is the year that The Night of the Big Wind, the most damaging storm in 300 years, sweeps across Ireland, damaging or destroying more than 20% of the houses in Dublin.
year.1838: is the year that Alfred Vail and colleagues demonstrate a telegraph system using dots and dashes (this is the forerunner of Morse code).
year.1809: is the year that Combined British, Portuguese and colonial Brazilian forces begin the Invasion of Cayenne during the Napoleonic Wars.
year.1724: is the year that Sie werden aus Saba alle kommen, BWV 65, a Bach cantata, for Epiphany, is performed the first time.
year.1721: is the year that The Committee of Inquiry on the South Sea Bubble publishes its findings, revealing details of fraud among company directors and corrupt politicians.
year.1661: is the year that English Restoration: The Fifth Monarchists unsuccessfully attempt to seize control of London, England. The revolt is suppressed after a few days.
year.1641: is the year that Arauco War: The first Parliament of Quillín is celebrated, putting a temporary hold on hostilities between Mapuches and Spanish in Chile.
year.1579: is the year that The Union of Arras unites the southern Netherlands under the Duke of Parma (Ottavio Farnese), governor in the name of King Philip II of Spain.
year.1540: is the year that King Henry VIII of England marries Anne of Cleves.
year.1536: is the year that The first European school of higher learning in the Americas, Colegio de Santa Cruz de Tlatelolco, is founded by Viceroy Antonio de Mendoza and Bishop Juan de Zumárraga in Mexico City.
year.1449: is the year that Constantine XI is crowned Byzantine Emperor at Mystras.
year.1355: is the year that Charles IV of Bohemia is crowned with the Iron Crown of Lombardy as King of Italy in Milan.
year.1322: is the year that Stephen Uroš III is crowned King of Serbia, having defeated his half-brother Stefan Konstantin in battle. His son is crowned "young king" in the same ceremony.
year.1205: is the year that Philip of Swabia undergoes a second coronation as King of the Romans.
year.1066: is the year that Following the death of Edward the Confessor on the previous day, the Witan meets to confirm Harold Godwinson as the new King of England; Harold is crowned the same day, sparking a succession crisis that will eventually lead to the Norman conquest of England.
year.1980: is the year that U.S. President Jimmy Carter authorizes legislation giving $1.5 billion in loans to bail out the Chrysler Corporation.
year.1950: is the year that In the Sverdlovsk air disaster, all 19 of those on board are killed, including almost the entire national ice hockey team (VVS Moscow) of the Soviet Air Force – 11 players, as well as a team doctor and a masseur.
year.1940: is the year that Winter War: Battle of Raate Road: The Finnish 9th Division finally defeat the numerically superior Soviet forces on the Raate-Suomussalmi road.
year.1935: is the year that Benito Mussolini and French Foreign Minister Pierre Laval sign the Franco-Italian Agreement.
year.1931: is the year that Guy Menzies flies the first solo non-stop trans-Tasman flight (from Australia to New Zealand) in 11 hours and 45 minutes, crash-landing on New Zealand's west coast.
year.1922: is the year that Dáil Éireann ratifies the Anglo-Irish Treaty by a 64–57 vote.
year.1904: is the year that The distress signal "CQD" is established only to be replaced two years later by "SOS".
year.1894: is the year that Thomas Edison makes a kinetoscopic film of someone sneezing. On the same day, his employee, William Kennedy Dickson, receives a patent for motion picture film.
year.1867: is the year that The Kingstree jail fire kills 22 freedmen in Reconstruction-era South Carolina.
year.1835: is the year that HMS Beagle, with Charles Darwin on board, drops anchor off the Chonos Archipelago.
year.1785: is the year that Frenchman Jean-Pierre Blanchard and American John Jeffries travel from Dover, England, to Calais, France, in a gas balloon.
year.1782: is the year that The first American commercial bank, the Bank of North America, opens.
year.1738: is the year that A peace treaty is signed between Peshwa Bajirao and Jai Singh II following Maratha victory in the Battle of Bhopal.
year.1708: is the year that Battle of Zlatoust: Battle between Bashkir and Tatar rebels and the government troops of the Tsardom of Russia. It is one of the events of the Bashkir rebellion of 1704–1711.
year.1610: is the year that Galileo Galilei makes his first observation of the four Galilean moons: Ganymede, Callisto, Io and Europa, although he is not able to distinguish the last two until the following night.
year.1608: is the year that Fire destroys Jamestown, Virginia.
year.1558: is the year that French troops, led by Francis, Duke of Guise, take Calais, the last continental possession of England.
year.1325: is the year that Afonso IV becomes King of Portugal.
year.1078: is the year that The people of Constantinople revolt, lynch the unpopular official Nikephoritzes and proclaim Nikephoros Botaneiates as emperor.
year.-49: is the year that The Senate of Rome says that Caesar will be declared a public enemy unless he disbands his army, prompting the tribunes who support him to flee to where Caesar is waiting in Ravenna.
year.1996: is the year that An Antonov An-32 cargo aircraft crashes into a crowded market in Kinshasa, Zaire, killing up to 223 people on the ground; two of six crew members are also killed.
year.1936: is the year that Kashf-e hijab decree is made and immediately enforced by Reza Shah, Iran's head of state, banning the wearing of Islamic veils in public.
year.1926: is the year that Crown Prince Nguyễn Phúc Vĩnh Thuỵ is crowned emperor of Vietnam, the country's last monarch.
year.1889: is the year that Herman Hollerith is issued US patent #395,791 for the 'Art of Applying Statistics' — his punched card calculator.
year.1828: is the year that The Democratic Party of the United States is organized.
year.1811: is the year that Charles Deslondes leads an unsuccessful slave revolt in the North American settlements of St. Charles and St. James, Louisiana.
year.1790: is the year that George Washington delivers the first State of the Union address in New York City.
year.1746: is the year that Second Jacobite rising: Bonnie Prince Charlie occupies Stirling.
year.1735: is the year that The premiere of George Frideric Handel's Ariodante takes place at the Royal Opera House, Covent Garden.
year.1547: is the year that The first Lithuanian-language book, the Catechism of Martynas Mažvydas, is published in Königsberg.
year.1499: is the year that Louis XII of France marries Anne of Brittany in accordance with a law set by his predecessor, Charles VIII.
year.1454: is the year that The papal bull Romanus Pontifex awards the Kingdom of Portugal exclusive trade and colonization rights to all of Africa south of Cape Bojador.
year.1297: is the year that François Grimaldi, disguised as a monk, leads his men to capture the fortress protecting the Rock of Monaco, establishing his family as the rulers of Monaco.
year.307: is the year that Sima Chi becomes emperor of the Jin dynasty in succession to his brother, Sima Zhong, despite a challenge from his other brother, Sima Ying.
year.1997: is the year that Comair Flight 3272 crashes in Raisinville Township in Monroe County, Michigan, killing 29 people.
year.1917: is the year that World War I: The Battle of Rafa is fought near the Egyptian border with Palestine.
year.1916: is the year that World War I: The Battle of Gallipoli concludes with an Ottoman Empire victory when the last Allied forces are evacuated from the peninsula.
year.1858: is the year that British forces finally defeat Rajab Ali Khan of Chittagong.
year.1857: is the year that The 7.9 Mw  Fort Tejon earthquake shakes Central and Southern California with a maximum Mercalli intensity of IX (Violent).
year.1816: is the year that Humphry Davy tests his safety lamp for miners at Hebburn Colliery.
year.1799: is the year that British Prime Minister William Pitt the Younger introduces an income tax of two shillings to the pound to raise funds for Great Britain's war effort in the Napoleonic Wars.
year.1793: is the year that Jean-Pierre Blanchard becomes the first person to fly in a balloon in the United States.
year.1792: is the year that Treaty of Jassy between Russian and Ottoman Empire is signed, ending the Russo-Turkish War of 1787–92.
year.1787: is the year that The nationally known image of the Black Nazarene in the Philippines is transferred from what is now Rizal Park to its present shrine in the minor basilica of Quiapo Church. This is annually commemorated through its Traslación (solemn transfer) in the streets of Manila and is attended by millions of devotees.
year.1760: is the year that Ahmad Shah Durrani defeats the Marathas in the Battle of Barari Ghat.
year.1693: is the year that Sicily earthquake: The first of two earthquakes destroys parts of Sicily and Malta. After the second quake on 11 January, the death toll is estimated at between 60,000 and 100,000 people.
year.1431: is the year that The trial of Joan of Arc begins in Rouen.
year.1349: is the year that The Jewish population of Basel, believed by the residents to be the cause of the ongoing Black Death, is rounded up and incinerated.
year.1127: is the year that Jin–Song Wars: Invading Jurchen soldiers from the Jin dynasty besiege and sack Bianjing (Kaifeng), the capital of the Song dynasty of China, and abduct Emperor Qinzong of Song and others, ending the Northern Song period.
year.1038: is the year that An earthquake in Dingxiang, China kills an estimated 32,300.
year.681: is the year that Twelfth Council of Toledo: King Erwig of the Visigoths initiates a council in which he implements diverse measures against the Jews in Spain.
year.475: is the year that Verina, the Eastern Roman dowager Empress, instigates a riot in Constantinople and persuades emperor Zeno, her son-in-law, to flee. The Byzantine senate, however, acclaims Basiliscus as emperor and not her lover Patricius.
year.400: is the year that Aelia Eudoxia is officially crowned empress of the Eastern Roman Empire.
year.1966: is the year that Tashkent Declaration, a peace agreement between India and Pakistan signed that resolved the Indo-Pakistani War of 1965.
year.1876: is the year that The Plan of Tuxtepec is announced.
year.1812: is the year that The first steamboat on the Ohio River or the Mississippi River arrives in New Orleans, 82 days after departing from Pittsburgh.
year.1645: is the year that Archbishop William Laud is beheaded for treason at the Tower of London.
year.1475: is the year that Stephen III of Moldavia defeats the Ottoman Empire at the Battle of Vaslui.
year.1430: is the year that Philip the Good, the Duke of Burgundy, establishes the Order of the Golden Fleece, the most prestigious, exclusive, and expensive order of chivalry in the world.
year.1072: is the year that Robert Guiscard conquers Palermo in Sicily for the Normans.
year.236: is the year that Pope Fabian succeeds Anterus to become the twentieth pope of Rome.
year.9: is the year that The Western Han dynasty ends when Wang Mang claims that the divine Mandate of Heaven called for the end of the dynasty and the beginning of his own, the Xin dynasty.
year.1986: is the year that The Gateway Bridge, Brisbane, Queensland, Australia is officially opened.
year.1943: is the year that The Republic of China agrees to the Sino-British New Equal Treaty and the Sino-American New Equal Treaty.
year.1908: is the year that Grand Canyon National Monument is created.
year.1879: is the year that The Anglo-Zulu War begins.
year.1851: is the year that Taiping Rebellion: Hong Xiuquan proclaims the Taiping Heavenly Kingdom, starting the Jintian Uprising.
year.1820: is the year that The Great Savannah Fire of 1820 destroys over 400 buildings in Savannah, Georgia.
year.1805: is the year that The Michigan Territory is created.
year.1759: is the year that The first American life insurance company, the Corporation for Relief of Poor and Distressed Presbyterian Ministers and of the Poor and Distressed Widows and Children of the Presbyterian Ministers (now part of Unum Group), is incorporated in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.
year.1654: is the year that Arauco War: A Spanish army is defeated by local Mapuche-Huilliches as it tries to cross Bueno River in Southern Chile.
year.1569: is the year that First recorded lottery in England.
year.1158: is the year that Vladislaus II, Duke of Bohemia becomes King of Bohemia.
year.1055: is the year that Theodora is crowned empress of the Byzantine Empire.
year.930: is the year that Sack of Mecca by the Qarmatians.
year.630: is the year that Conquest of Mecca: Muhammad and his followers conquer the city, and the Quraysh association of clans surrenders.
year.532: is the year that Nika riots in Constantinople: A quarrel between supporters of different chariot teams—the Blues and the Greens—in the Hippodrome escalates into violence.
year.1915: is the year that The United States House of Representatives rejects a proposed constitutional amendment to require states to give women the right to vote.
year.1872: is the year that Yohannes IV is crowned Emperor of Ethiopia in Axum, the first imperial coronation in that city in over 200 years.
year.1866: is the year that The Royal Aeronautical Society is formed in London.
year.1616: is the year that The city of Belém, Brazil is founded on the Amazon River delta by Portuguese captain Francisco Caldeira Castelo Branco.
year.1554: is the year that Bayinnaung, who would go on to assemble the largest empire in the history of Southeast Asia, is crowned King of Burma.
year.1528: is the year that Gustav I of Sweden is crowned King of Sweden, having already reigned since his election in June 1523.
year.1939: is the year that The Black Friday bushfires burn 20,000 square kilometres (7,700 sq mi) of land in Australia, claiming the lives of 71 people.
year.1893: is the year that The Independent Labour Party of the United Kingdom holds its first meeting.
year.1888: is the year that The National Geographic Society is founded in Washington, D.C.
year.1849: is the year that Establishment of the Colony of Vancouver Island.
year.1842: is the year that Dr. William Brydon, an assistant surgeon in the British East India Company Army during the First Anglo-Afghan War, becomes famous for being the sole survivor of an army of 4,500 men and 12,000 camp followers when he reaches the safety of a garrison in Jalalabad, Afghanistan.
year.1840: is the year that The steamship Lexington burns and sinks four miles off the coast of Long Island with the loss of 139 lives.
year.1797: is the year that French Revolutionary Wars: A naval battle between a French ship of the line and two British frigates off the coast of Brittany ends with the French vessel running aground, resulting in over 900 deaths.
year.1435: is the year that Sicut Dudum, forbidding the enslavement by the Spanish of the Guanche natives in Canary Islands who had converted, or were converting to, Christianity, is promulgated by Pope Eugene IV.
year.-27: is the year that Octavian transfers the state to the free disposal of the Roman Senate and the people. He receives Spain, Gaul, and Syria as his province for ten years.
year.1952: is the year that NBC's long-running morning news program Today debuts, with host Dave Garroway.
year.1907: is the year that An earthquake in Kingston, Jamaica kills more than 1,000 people.
year.1814: is the year that Treaty of Kiel: Frederick VI of Denmark cedes the Kingdom of Norway to Charles XIII of Sweden in return for Pomerania.
year.1784: is the year that American Revolutionary War: Ratification Day, United States: Congress ratifies the Treaty of Paris with Great Britain.
year.1761: is the year that The Third Battle of Panipat, the largest battle of the 18th century, is fought in India between the Afghan Durrani Empire under Ahmad Shah Durrani, and the Maratha Empire under Sadashivrao Bhau.
year.1301: is the year that Andrew III of Hungary dies, ending the Árpád dynasty in Hungary.
year.1236: is the year that King Henry III of England marries Eleanor of Provence.
year.1937: is the year that Spanish Civil War: Nationalists and Republicans both withdraw after suffering heavy losses, ending the Second Battle of the Corunna Road.
year.1582: is the year that Truce of Yam-Zapolsky: Russia cedes Livonia to the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth.
year.1559: is the year that Elizabeth I is crowned Queen of England and Ireland in Westminster Abbey, London.
year.1541: is the year that King Francis I of France gives Jean-François Roberval a commission to settle the province of New France (Canada) and provide for the spread of the "Holy Catholic faith".
year.1535: is the year that King Henry VIII issues letters patent incorporating the title Supreme Head of the Church of England into his royal title.
year.1883: is the year that The Pendleton Civil Service Reform Act, establishing the United States Civil Service, is enacted by Congress.
year.1862: is the year that Hartley Colliery disaster: Two hundred and four men and boys killed in a mining disaster, prompting a change in UK law which henceforth required all collieries to have at least two independent means of escape.
year.1786: is the year that Virginia enacts the Statute for Religious Freedom authored by Thomas Jefferson.
year.1780: is the year that American Revolutionary War: Battle of Cape St. Vincent.
year.1716: is the year that King Philip V of Spain promulgates the Nueva Planta decree of the Principality of Catalonia, abolishing the Catalan institutions and its legal system, being replaced by those of Castile, thus putting an end to Catalonia as separate state and becoming a province of the new French-style Kingdom of Spain.
year.1605: is the year that The first edition of El ingenioso hidalgo Don Quijote de la Mancha (Book One of Don Quixote) by Miguel de Cervantes is published in Madrid, Spain.
year.1572: is the year that Thomas Howard, 4th Duke of Norfolk is tried and found guilty of treason for his part in the Ridolfi plot to restore Catholicism in England.
year.1556: is the year that Philip II becomes King of Spain.
year.1537: is the year that Bigod's Rebellion, an armed insurrection attempting to resist the English Reformation, begins.
year.1362: is the year that Saint Marcellus's flood kills at least 25,000 people on the shores of the North Sea.
year.1275: is the year that Edward I permits his mother Eleanor of Provence to expel the Jews from the towns Worcester, Marlborough, Cambridge and Gloucester.
year.1120: is the year that Crusades: The Council of Nablus is held, establishing the earliest surviving written laws of the Crusader Kingdom of Jerusalem.
year.929: is the year that Emir Abd-ar-Rahman III establishes the Caliphate of Córdoba.
year.550: is the year that Gothic War: The Ostrogoths, under King Totila, conquer Rome after a long siege, by bribing the Isaurian garrison.
year.378: is the year that General Siyaj K'ak' conquers Tikal, enlarging the domain of King Spearthrower Owl of Teotihuacán.
year.-1458: is the year that Hatshepsut dies at the age of 50 and is buried in the Valley of the Kings.
year.1873: is the year that A group of Modoc warriors defeats the United States Army in the First Battle of the Stronghold, part of the Modoc War.
year.1852: is the year that The United Kingdom signs the Sand River Convention with the South African Republic.
year.1648: is the year that England's Long Parliament passes the "Vote of No Addresses", breaking off negotiations with King Charles I and thereby setting the scene for the second phase of the English Civil War.
year.1595: is the year that During the French Wars of Religion, Henry IV of France declares war on Spain.
year.1562: is the year that France grants religious toleration to the Huguenots in the Edict of Saint-Germain.
year.1524: is the year that Giovanni da Verrazzano sets sail westward from Madeira to find a sea route to the Pacific Ocean.
year.1377: is the year that Pope Gregory XI reaches Rome, after deciding to move the Papacy back to Rome from Avignon.
year.-38: is the year that Octavian divorces his wife Scribonia and marries Livia Drusilla, ending the fragile peace between the Second Triumvirate and Sextus Pompey.
year.1886: is the year that Modern field hockey is born with the formation of The Hockey Association in England.
year.1778: is the year that James Cook is the first known European to discover the Hawaiian Islands, which he names the "Sandwich Islands".
year.1701: is the year that Frederick I crowns himself King in Prussia in Königsberg.
year.1670: is the year that Henry Morgan captures Panama.
year.1586: is the year that The magnitude 7.9 Tenshō earthquake strikes Honshu, Japan, killing 8,000 people and triggering a tsunami.
year.1486: is the year that King Henry VII of England marries Elizabeth of York, daughter of Edward IV, uniting the House of Lancaster and the House of York.
year.1126: is the year that Emperor Huizong abdicates the Chinese throne in favour of his son Emperor Qinzong.
year.474: is the year that Seven-year-old Leo II succeeds his maternal grandfather Leo I as Byzantine emperor. He dies ten months later.
year.350: is the year that General Magnentius is proclaimed emperor by Roman aristocrats discontent with the rule of emperor Constans.
year.1829: is the year that Johann Wolfgang von Goethe's Faust: The First Part of the Tragedy receives its premiere performance.
year.1817: is the year that An army of 5,423 soldiers, led by General José de San Martín, crosses the Andes from Argentina to liberate Chile and then Peru.
year.1795: is the year that The Batavian Republic is proclaimed in the Netherlands, replacing the Dutch Republic.
year.1764: is the year that John Wilkes is expelled from the British House of Commons for seditious libel.
year.1639: is the year that Hämeenlinna (Swedish: Tavastehus) is granted privileges after it separated from the Vanaja parish as its own city in Tavastia.
year.1607: is the year that San Agustin Church in Manila is officially completed; it is the oldest church still standing in the Philippines.
year.1520: is the year that Sten Sture the Younger, the Regent of Sweden, is mortally wounded at the Battle of Bogesund and dies on February 3.
year.1511: is the year that The Italian Duchy of Mirandola surrenders to the Pope.
year.1421: is the year that John VIII Palaiologos marries Sophia of Montferrat and is then crowned Byzantine co-emperor to his father Manuel II Palaiologos.
year.1419: is the year that Hundred Years' War: Rouen surrenders to Henry V of England, completing his reconquest of Normandy.
year.649: is the year that Conquest of Kucha: The forces of Kucha surrender after a forty-day siege led by Tang dynasty general Ashina She'er, establishing Tang control over the northern Tarim Basin in Xinjiang.
year.379: is the year that Emperor Gratian elevates Flavius Theodosius at Sirmium to Augustus, and gives him authority over all the eastern provinces of the Roman Empire.
year.1887: is the year that The United States Senate allows the Navy to lease Pearl Harbor as a naval base.
year.1874: is the year that The Treaty of Pangkor is signed between the British and Sultan Abdullah of Perak, paving the way for further British colonization of Malaya.
year.1841: is the year that Hong Kong Island is occupied by the British during the First Opium War.
year.1783: is the year that The Kingdom of Great Britain signs preliminary articles of peace with the Kingdom of France, setting the stage for the official end of hostilities in the American Revolutionary War later that year.
year.1576: is the year that The Mexican city of León is founded by order of the viceroy Don Martín Enríquez de Almanza.
year.1567: is the year that Battle of Rio de Janeiro: Portuguese forces under the command of Estácio de Sá definitively drive the French out of Rio de Janeiro.
year.1523: is the year that Christian II is forced to abdicate as King of Denmark and Norway.
year.1401: is the year that The Taula de canvi (Catalan: "Table of change"), described as Europe's first-ever public bank, began operations inside Barcelona's Llotja de Mar.
year.1356: is the year that Edward Balliol surrenders his claim to the Scottish throne to Edward III in exchange for an English pension.
year.1320: is the year that Duke Wladyslaw Lokietek becomes king of Poland.
year.1265: is the year that The first English parliament to include not only Lords but also representatives of the major towns holds its first meeting in the Palace of Westminster, now commonly known as the "Houses of Parliament".
year.1156: is the year that Finnish peasant Lalli kills English clergyman Henry, the Bishop of Turku, on the ice of Lake Köyliö.
year.1824: is the year that The Ashantis defeat British forces in the Gold Coast during the First Anglo-Ashanti War.
year.1789: is the year that The first American novel, The Power of Sympathy or the Triumph of Nature Founded in Truth by William Hill Brown, is printed in Boston.
year.1774: is the year that Abdul Hamid I becomes Sultan of the Ottoman Empire and Caliph of Islam.
year.1720: is the year that Sweden and Prussia sign the Treaty of Stockholm.
year.1525: is the year that The Swiss Anabaptist Movement is founded when Conrad Grebel, Felix Manz, George Blaurock, and about a dozen others baptize each other in the home of Manz's mother in Zürich, breaking a thousand-year tradition of church-state union.
year.763: is the year that Following the Battle of Bakhamra between Alids and Abbasids near Kufa, the Alid rebellion ends with the death of Ibrahim, brother of Isa ibn Musa.
year.1924: is the year that Ramsay MacDonald becomes the first Labour Prime Minister of the United Kingdom.
year.1906: is the year that SS Valencia runs aground on rocks on Vancouver Island, British Columbia, killing more than 130.
year.1905: is the year that Bloody Sunday occurs in Saint Petersburg, beginning the 1905 revolution.
year.1689: is the year that The Convention Parliament convenes to determine whether James II and VII, the last Roman Catholic monarch of England, Ireland and Scotland, had vacated the thrones of England and Ireland when he fled to France in 1688.
year.1555: is the year that The Ava Kingdom falls to the Taungoo Dynasty in what is now Myanmar.
year.1517: is the year that The Ottoman Empire under Selim I defeats the Mamluk Sultanate and captures present-day Egypt at the Battle of Ridaniya.
year.1506: is the year that The first contingent of 150 Swiss Guards arrives at the Vatican.
year.613: is the year that Eight-month-old Heraclius Constantine is crowned as co-emperor (Caesar) by his father Heraclius at Constantinople.
year.1846: is the year that Slavery in Tunisia is abolished.
year.1755: is the year that Moscow University is established (12 January 1755 O.S.).
year.1719: is the year that The Principality of Liechtenstein is created within the Holy Roman Empire.
year.1656: is the year that Blaise Pascal publishes the first of his Lettres provinciales.
year.1571: is the year that The Royal Exchange opens in London.
year.1570: is the year that James Stewart, 1st Earl of Moray, regent for the infant King James VI of Scotland, is assassinated by firearm, the first recorded instance of such.
year.1565: is the year that The Deccan Sultanates defeat Rama Raya of the Vijayanagara Empire at the Battle of Talikota, resulting in over 100,000 casualties and the destruction of the capital Vijayanagara.
year.1546: is the year that Having published nothing for eleven years, François Rabelais publishes the Tiers Livre, his sequel to Gargantua and Pantagruel.
year.1368: is the year that Zhu Yuanzhang proclaims himself the Hongwu Emperor, beginning the Ming dynasty.
year.1264: is the year that In the conflict between King Henry III of England and his rebellious barons led by Simon de Montfort, King Louis IX of France issues the Mise of Amiens, a one-sided decision in favour of Henry that later leads to the Second Barons' War.
year.1229: is the year that The episcopal seat is moved from Nousiainen to Koroinen (located near the current centre of Turku) by the permission of Pope Gregory IX. The date is starting to be considered as the founding of Turku.
year.971: is the year that Using crossbows, Song dynasty troops soundly defeat a war elephant corps of the Southern Han at Shao.
year.393: is the year that Roman emperor Theodosius I proclaims his eight-year-old son Honorius co-emperor.
year.1859: is the year that The United Principalities of Moldavia and Wallachia (later named Romania) is formed as a personal union under the rule of Domnitor Alexandru Ioan Cuza.
year.1758: is the year that During the Seven Years' War the leading burghers of Königsberg submit to Elizabeth of Russia, thus forming Russian Prussia (until 1763).
year.1742: is the year that Charles VII Albert becomes Holy Roman Emperor.
year.1679: is the year that King Charles II of England dissolves the Cavalier Parliament.
year.1458: is the year that Matthias Corvinus is elected King of Hungary.
year.914: is the year that Start of the First Fatimid invasion of Egypt.
year.41: is the year that Claudius is proclaimed Roman emperor by the Praetorian Guard after they assassinate the previous emperor, his nephew Caligula.
year.1881: is the year that Thomas Edison and Alexander Graham Bell form the Oriental Telephone Company.
year.1819: is the year that University of Virginia chartered by Commonwealth of Virginia, with Thomas Jefferson one of its founders.
year.1704: is the year that The Apalachee massacre: A combined British and Muscogee force from the Province of Carolina destroys the main fortified mission of Ayubale, breaking Spain's hold on Spanish Florida.
year.1650: is the year that As part of the purges following the Great Potosí Mint Fraud of 1649 Francisco Gómez de la Rocha, a rich former corregidor of Potosí, is executed.
year.1585: is the year that Walter Raleigh is knighted, shortly after renaming North America region "Virginia", in honor of Elizabeth I, Queen of England, sometimes referred to as the "Virgin Queen".
year.1575: is the year that Luanda, the capital of Angola, is founded by the Portuguese navigator Paulo Dias de Novais.
year.1573: is the year that Battle of Mikatagahara: In Japan, Takeda Shingen defeats Tokugawa Ieyasu.
year.1533: is the year that Henry VIII of England secretly marries his second wife Anne Boleyn.
year.1494: is the year that Alfonso II becomes King of Naples.
year.1479: is the year that The Treaty of Constantinople ends the 16-year-long First Ottoman–Venetian War.
year.1348: is the year that A strong earthquake strikes the South Alpine region of Friuli in modern Italy, causing considerable damage to buildings as far away as Rome.
year.1327: is the year that Fourteen-year-old Edward III ascends the throne of England after his father the king is forced to abdicate by Queen Isabella and her lover, Roger Mortimer.
year.750: is the year that In the Battle of the Zab, the Abbasid rebels defeat the Umayyad Caliphate, leading to the overthrow of the dynasty.
year.1930: is the year that The Indian National Congress declares 26 January as Independence Day or as the day for Poorna Swaraj ("Complete Independence") which occurred 17 years later.
year.1856: is the year that First Battle of Seattle: Marines from the USS Decatur drive off Native American attackers after all-day battle with settlers.
year.1855: is the year that Point No Point Treaty is signed in Washington Territory.
year.1837: is the year that Michigan is admitted as the 26th U.S. state.
year.1765: is the year that A British naval expedition arrives at and names Port Egmont in the Falkland Islands, founding a settlement there eight days later. (Arrival was 15 January 1765 O.S.)
year.1699: is the year that For the first time, the Ottoman Empire permanently cedes territory to the Christian powers.
year.1564: is the year that The Council of Trent establishes an official distinction between Roman Catholicism and Protestantism.
year.1531: is the year that The 6.4–7.1 Mw Lisbon earthquake kills about thirty thousand people.
year.661: is the year that The Rashidun Caliphate is effectively ended with the assassination of Ali, the last caliph.
year.1880: is the year that Thomas Edison receives a patent for his incandescent lamp.
year.1869: is the year that Boshin War: Tokugawa rebels establish the Ezo Republic in Hokkaidō.
year.1825: is the year that The U.S. Congress approves Indian Territory (in what is present-day Oklahoma), clearing the way for forced relocation of the Eastern Indians on the "Trail of Tears".
year.1695: is the year that Mustafa II becomes the Ottoman sultan and Caliph of Islam in Istanbul on the death of Ahmed II. Mustafa rules until his abdication in 1703.
year.1606: is the year that Gunpowder Plot: The trial of Guy Fawkes and other conspirators begins, ending with their execution on January 31.
year.1343: is the year that Pope Clement VI issues the papal bull Unigenitus, laying out the scriptural justification for indulgences, identifying only the Pope and episcopate as capable of accessing the treasury of merit, and establishing a jubilee year every half century.
year.1302: is the year that Dante Alighieri is condemned in absentia and exiled from Florence.
year.1186: is the year that Henry VI, the son and heir of the Holy Roman Emperor Frederick I, marries Constance of Sicily.
year.945: is the year that The co-emperors Stephen and Constantine are overthrown and forced to become monks by Constantine VII, who becomes sole emperor of the Byzantine Empire.
year.98: is the year that Trajan succeeds his adoptive father Nerva as Roman emperor.
year.1938: is the year that The World Land Speed Record on a public road is broken by Rudolf Caracciola in the Mercedes-Benz W125 Rekordwagen at a speed of 432.7 kilometres per hour (268.9 mph).
year.1813: is the year that Jane Austen's Pride and Prejudice is first published in the United Kingdom.
year.1754: is the year that Sir Horace Walpole coins the word serendipity in a letter to a friend.
year.1671: is the year that Original city of Panama (founded in 1519) is destroyed by a fire when privateer Henry Morgan sacks and sets fire to it. The site of the previously devastated city is still in ruins (see Panama Viejo).
year.1624: is the year that Sir Thomas Warner founds the first British colony in the Caribbean, on the island of Saint Kitts.
year.1591: is the year that Execution of Agnes Sampson, accused of witchcraft in Edinburgh.
year.1568: is the year that The Edict of Torda prohibits the persecution of individuals on religious grounds in John Sigismund Zápolya's Eastern Hungarian Kingdom.
year.1393: is the year that King Charles VI of France is nearly killed when several other dancers' costumes catch fire during a masquerade ball in Paris.
year.1077: is the year that Walk to Canossa: The excommunication of Henry IV, Holy Roman Emperor, is lifted after he humbles himself before Pope Gregory VII at Canossa in Italy.
year.1069: is the year that Robert de Comines, appointed Earl of Northumbria by William the Conqueror, rides into Durham, England, where he is defeated and killed by rebels. This incident leads to the Harrying of the North.
year.814: is the year that The death of Charlemagne, the first Holy Roman Emperor, brings about the accession of his son Louis the Pious as ruler of the Frankish Empire.
year.1891: is the year that Liliʻuokalani is proclaimed the last monarch and only queen regnant of the Kingdom of Hawaii.
year.1850: is the year that Henry Clay introduces the Compromise of 1850 to the U.S. Congress.
year.946: is the year that Caliph al-Mustakfi is blinded and deposed by Mu'izz al-Dawla, ruler of the Buyid Empire. He is succeeded by al-Muti as caliph of the Abbasid Caliphate.
year.904: is the year that Sergius III is elected pope, after coming out of retirement to take over the papacy from the deposed antipope Christopher.
year.1826: is the year that The Menai Suspension Bridge, considered the world's first modern suspension bridge, connecting the Isle of Anglesey to the northwest coast of Wales, is opened.
year.1667: is the year that The Truce of Andrusovo is signed, ending the Russian-Polish War of 1654-1667.
year.1287: is the year that King Wareru founds the Hanthawaddy kingdom, and proclaims independence from the Pagan Kingdom.
year.1018: is the year that Poland and the Holy Roman Empire conclude the Peace of Bautzen.
year.1747: is the year that The first venereal diseases clinic opens at London Lock Hospital.
year.1703: is the year that Forty-seven rōnin, under the command of Ōishi Kuranosuke, avenged the death of their master, by killing Kira Yoshinaka.
year.1609: is the year that Wisselbank of Amsterdam established
year.1578: is the year that Eighty Years' War and Anglo-Spanish War: The Battle of Gembloux is a victory for Spanish forces led by Don John of Austria over a rebel army of Dutch, Flemish, English, Scottish, German, French and Walloons.
year.1504: is the year that The Treaty of Lyon ends the Italian War, confirming French domination of northern Italy, while Spain receives the Kingdom of Naples.
year.1266: is the year that The Mudéjar of Murcia, who had rebelled against the Crown of Castile during the Mudéjar revolt of 1264–1266, surrender the city to James I of Aragon after a siege lasting a month.
year.1208: is the year that The Battle of Lena takes place between King Sverker II of Sweden and his rival, Prince Eric, whose victory puts him on the throne as King Eric X of Sweden.
year.314: is the year that Pope Sylvester I is consecrated, as successor to the late Pope Miltiades.
year.1897: is the year that Shinhan Bank, the oldest bank in South Korea, opens in Seoul.
year.1864: is the year that Second Schleswig War: Prussian forces crossed the border into Schleswig, starting the war.
year.1796: is the year that The capital of Upper Canada is moved from Newark to York.
year.1713: is the year that The Kalabalik or Skirmish at Bender results from the Ottoman Sultan Ahmed III's order that his unwelcome guest, King Charles XII of Sweden, be seized.
year.1662: is the year that The Chinese general Koxinga seizes the island of Taiwan after a nine-month siege.
year.1411: is the year that The First Peace of Thorn is signed in Thorn (Toruń), Monastic State of the Teutonic Knights (Prussia).
year.1709: is the year that Alexander Selkirk is rescued after being shipwrecked on a desert island, inspiring Daniel Defoe's adventure book Robinson Crusoe.
year.1461: is the year that Wars of the Roses: The Battle of Mortimer's Cross results in the death of Owen Tudor.
year.1428: is the year that An intense earthquake struck the Principality of Catalonia, with the epicenter near Camprodon. Widespread destruction and heavy casualties were reported.
year.1347: is the year that Byzantine Empress Anna convenes a synod to depose patriarch Joseph XIV in Constantinople. The same night, conspirators let in her rival John VI Kantakouzenos which ends the Byzantine civil war of 1341–1347.
year.1207: is the year that Terra Mariana, eventually comprising present-day Latvia and Estonia, is established.
year.1141: is the year that The Battle of Lincoln, at which Stephen, King of England is defeated and captured by the allies of Empress Matilda.
year.1032: is the year that Conrad II, Holy Roman Emperor becomes king of Burgundy.
year.962: is the year that Translatio imperii: Pope John XII crowns Otto I, Holy Roman Emperor, the first Holy Roman Emperor in nearly 40 years.
year.880: is the year that Battle of Lüneburg Heath: King Louis III of France is defeated by the Norse Great Heathen Army at Lüneburg Heath in Saxony.
year.506: is the year that Alaric II, eighth king of the Visigoths, promulgates the Breviary of Alaric (Breviarium Alaricianum or Lex Romana Visigothorum), a collection of "Roman law".
year.1830: is the year that The London Protocol of 1830 establishes the full independence and sovereignty of Greece from the Ottoman Empire as the final result of the Greek War of Independence.
year.1807: is the year that A British military force, under Brigadier-General Sir Samuel Auchmuty captures the Spanish Empire city of Montevideo, now the capital of Uruguay.
year.1706: is the year that During the Battle of Fraustadt Swedish forces defeat a superior Saxon-Polish-Russian force by deploying a double envelopment.
year.1690: is the year that The colony of Massachusetts issues the first paper money in the Americas.
year.1637: is the year that Tulip Mania collapses within the Dutch Republic.
year.1583: is the year that Battle of São Vicente takes place off Portuguese Brazil where three English warships led by navigator Edward Fenton fight off three Spanish galleons sinking one in the process.
year.1509: is the year that The Portuguese navy defeats a joint fleet of the Ottoman Empire, the Republic of Venice, the Sultan of Gujarat, the Mamlûk Burji Sultanate of Egypt, the Zamorin of Calicut, and the Republic of Ragusa at the Battle of Diu in Diu, India.
year.1488: is the year that Bartolomeu Dias of Portugal lands in Mossel Bay after rounding the Cape of Good Hope, becoming the first known European to travel so far south.
year.1451: is the year that Sultan Mehmed II inherits the throne of the Ottoman Empire.
year.1112: is the year that Ramon Berenguer III, Count of Barcelona, and Douce I, Countess of Provence, marry, uniting the fortunes of those two states.
year.1047: is the year that Drogo of Hauteville is elected as count of the Apulian Normans during the Norman conquest of Southern Italy.
year.1794: is the year that The French legislature abolishes slavery throughout all territories of the French First Republic. It would be reestablished in the French West Indies in 1802.
year.1169: is the year that A strong earthquake strikes the Ionian coast of Sicily, causing tens of thousands of injuries and deaths, especially in Catania.
year.960: is the year that Zhao Kuangyin declares himself Emperor Taizu of Song, ending the Later Zhou and beginning the Song dynasty.
year.211: is the year that Following the death of the Roman Emperor Septimius Severus at Eboracum (modern York, England) while preparing to lead a campaign against the Caledonians, the empire is left in the control of his two quarrelling sons, Caracalla and Geta, whom he had instructed to make peace.
year.1597: is the year that A group of early Japanese Christians are killed by the new government of Japan for being seen as a threat to Japanese society.
year.756: is the year that An Lushan proclaims himself Emperor of China, founding the short-lived state of Yan.
year.62: is the year that An earthquake with an estimated intensity between IX or X on the Mercalli scale occurs in Pompeii, Italy.
year.-2: is the year that Caesar Augustus is granted the title pater patriae by the Roman Senate.
year.1843: is the year that The first minstrel show in the United States, The Virginia Minstrels, opens (Bowery Amphitheatre in New York City).
year.1694: is the year that Dandara, leader of the runaway slaves in Quilombo dos Palmares, Brazil, is captured and commits suicide rather than be returned to a life of slavery.
year.1685: is the year that James II of England and VII of Scotland is proclaimed King upon the death of his brother Charles II.
year.590: is the year that Hormizd IV, king of the Sasanian Empire, is overthrown and blinded by his brothers-in-law Vistahm and Vinduyih.
year.337: is the year that Election of pope Julius I.
year.1756: is the year that Guaraní War: The leader of the Guaraní rebels, Sepé Tiaraju, is killed in a skirmish with Spanish and Portuguese troops.
year.1497: is the year that In Florence, Italy, supporters of Girolamo Savonarola burn cosmetics, art, and books, in a "Bonfire of the vanities".
year.1365: is the year that Albert III of Mecklenburg (King Albert of Sweden) grants city rights to Ulvila (Swedish: Ulvsby).
year.1313: is the year that King Thihathu founds the Pinya Kingdom as the de jure successor state of the Pagan Kingdom.
year.1285: is the year that A synod at Blachernae convened by anti-Unionist Greek clergy condemns the former pro-Unionist patriarch John XI of Constantinople.
year.987: is the year that Bardas Phokas the Younger and Bardas Skleros, Byzantine generals of the military elite, begin a wide-scale rebellion against Emperor Basil II.
year.457: is the year that Leo I becomes the Eastern Roman emperor.
year.1601: is the year that Robert Devereux, 2nd Earl of Essex, unsuccessfully rebels against Queen Elizabeth I.
year.1587: is the year that Mary, Queen of Scots is executed on suspicion of having been involved in the Babington Plot to murder her cousin, Queen Elizabeth I.
year.1250: is the year that Seventh Crusade: Crusaders engage Ayyubid forces in the Battle of Al Mansurah.
year.1238: is the year that The Mongols burn the Russian city of Vladimir.
year.421: is the year that Constantius III becomes co-emperor of the Western Roman Empire.
year.1775: is the year that American Revolutionary War: The British Parliament declares Massachusetts in rebellion.
year.1621: is the year that Gregory XV becomes Pope, the last Pope elected by acclamation.
year.1539: is the year that The first recorded race is held on Chester Racecourse, known as the Roodee.
year.1098: is the year that A First Crusade army led by Bohemond of Taranto wins a major battle against the Seljuq emir Ridwan of Aleppo during the siege of Antioch.
year.1003: is the year that Boleslaus III is restored to authority with armed support from Bolesław I the Brave of Poland.
year.1763: is the year that French and Indian War: The Treaty of Paris ends the war and France cedes Quebec to Great Britain.
year.1712: is the year that Huilliches in Chiloé rebel against Spanish encomenderos.
year.1392: is the year that Byzantine Emperor Manuel II Palaiologos marries Helena Dragaš, daughter of the Serbian Prince Constantine Dragaš. She is crowned as empress the following day.
year.1306: is the year that In front of the high altar of Greyfriars Church in Dumfries, Robert the Bruce murders John Comyn, sparking the revolution in the Wars of Scottish Independence.
year.1258: is the year that The Siege of Baghdad ends with the surrender of the last Abbasid caliph to Hulegu Khan, a prince of the Mongol Empire.
year.1823: is the year that Carnival tragedy of 1823: About 110 boys are killed during a human crush at the Convent of the Minori Osservanti in Valletta, Malta.
year.1659: is the year that The assault on Copenhagen by Swedish forces is beaten back with heavy losses.
year.1584: is the year that A naval expedition led by Pedro Sarmiento de Gamboa founds Nombre de Jesús, the first of two short-lived Spanish settlements in the Strait of Magellan.
year.1534: is the year that At the Convocation of Canterbury, the Catholic bishops comprising the Upper House of the Province of Canterbury agree to style Henry VIII supreme head of the English church and clergy "so far as the law of Christ allows".
year.1144: is the year that Robert of Chester completes his translation from Arabic to Latin of the Liber de compositione alchemiae, marking the birth of Western alchemy.
year.951: is the year that Guo Wei, a court official, leads a military coup and declares himself emperor of the new Later Zhou.
year.55: is the year that The death under mysterious circumstances of Tiberius Claudius Caesar Britannicus, heir to the Roman Empire, on the eve of his coming of age clears the way for Nero to become Emperor.
year.-660: is the year that Traditional date for the foundation of Japan by Emperor Jimmu.
year.1832: is the year that Ecuador annexes the Galápagos Islands.
year.1771: is the year that Gustav III becomes the King of Sweden.
year.1733: is the year that Georgia Day: Englishman James Oglethorpe founds Georgia, the 13th colony of the Thirteen Colonies, by settling at Savannah.
year.1593: is the year that Japanese invasion of Korea: Approximately 3,000 Joseon defenders led by general Kwŏn Yul successfully repel more than 30,000 Japanese forces in the Siege of Haengju.
year.1429: is the year that English forces under Sir John Fastolf defend a supply convoy carrying rations to the army besieging Orléans in the Battle of the Herrings.
year.1404: is the year that The Italian professor Galeazzo di Santa Sofia performs the first post-mortem autopsy for the purposes of teaching and demonstration at the Heiligen–Geist Spital in Vienna.
year.1096: is the year that Pope Urban II confirms the foundation of the abbey of La Roë under Robert of Arbrissel as a community of canons regular.
year.1059: is the year that Upon reaching Rome, Bruno of Toul is elected as pope Leo IX and starts initiating reforms.
year.1692: is the year that Massacre of Glencoe: Almost 80 Macdonalds at Glen Coe, Scotland are killed early in the morning for not promptly pledging allegiance to the new king, William of Orange.
year.1660: is the year that With the accession of young Charles XI of Sweden, his regents begin negotiations to end the Second Northern War.
year.1633: is the year that Galileo Galilei arrives in Rome for his trial before the Inquisition.
year.1542: is the year that Catherine Howard, the fifth wife of Henry VIII of England, is executed for adultery.
year.1503: is the year that Challenge of Barletta: Tournament between 13 Italian and 13 French knights near Barletta.
year.1462: is the year that The Treaty of Westminster is finalised between Edward IV of England and the Scottish Lord of the Isles.
year.1352: is the year that War of the Straits: The Battle of the Bosporus is fought in a stormy sea into the night between the Genoese, Venetian, Aragonese, and Byzantine fleets.
year.1831: is the year that Ras Marye of Yejju marches into Tigray and defeats and kills Dejazmach Sabagadis in the Battle of Debre Abbay.
year.1779: is the year that American Revolutionary War: The Battle of Kettle Creek is fought in Georgia.
year.1655: is the year that The Mapuches launch coordinated attacks against the Spanish in Chile beginning the Mapuche uprising of 1655.
year.1613: is the year that Wedding of Princess Elizabeth and Frederick V of the Palatinate at Whitehall Palace, London.
year.1530: is the year that Spanish conquistadores, led by Nuño de Guzmán, overthrow and execute Tangaxuan II, the last independent monarch of the Tarascan state in present-day central Mexico.
year.1130: is the year that The troubled 1130 papal election exposes a rift within the College of Cardinals.
year.1014: is the year that Pope Benedict VIII crowns Henry of Bavaria, King of Germany and of Italy, as Holy Roman Emperor.
year.842: is the year that Charles the Bald and Louis the German swear the Oaths of Strasbourg in the French and German languages.
year.748: is the year that Abbasid Revolution: The Hashimi rebels under Abu Muslim Khorasani take Merv, capital of the Umayyad province Khorasan, marking the consolidation of the Abbasid revolt.
year.1493: is the year that While on board the Niña, Christopher Columbus writes an open letter (widely distributed upon his return to Portugal) describing his discoveries and the unexpected items he came across in the New World.
year.1214: is the year that During the Anglo-French War (1213–1214), an English invasion force led by John, King of England, lands at La Rochelle in France.
year.1113: is the year that Pope Paschal II issues Pie Postulatio Voluntatis, recognizing the Order of Hospitallers.
year.1002: is the year that At an assembly at Pavia of Lombard nobles, Arduin of Ivrea is restored to his domains and crowned King of Italy.
year.706: is the year that Byzantine emperor Justinian II has his predecessors Leontios and Tiberios III publicly executed in the Hippodrome of Constantinople.
year.438: is the year that Roman emperor Theodosius II publishes the law codex Codex Theodosianus.
year.1646: is the year that Battle of Torrington, Devon: The last major battle of the First English Civil War.
year.1630: is the year that Dutch forces led by Hendrick Lonck capture Olinda in what was to become part of Dutch Brazil.
year.1270: is the year that The Grand Duchy of Lithuania defeats the Livonian Order in the Battle of Karuse.
year.1249: is the year that Andrew of Longjumeau is dispatched by Louis IX of France as his ambassador to meet with the Khagan of the Mongol Empire.
year.1753: is the year that In Sweden, February 17 is followed by March 1 as the country moves from the Julian calendar to the Gregorian calendar.
year.1676: is the year that Sixteen men of Pascual de Iriate's expedition are lost at Evangelistas Islets at the western end of the Strait of Magellan.
year.1674: is the year that An earthquake strikes the Indonesian island of Ambon. It triggers a 100 m (330 ft) megatsunami which drowns over 2,300 people.
year.1500: is the year that Duke Frederick of Schleswig-Holstein and King John of Denmark attempt to subdue the peasantry of Dithmarschen, Denmark, in the Battle of Hemmingstedt.
year.1370: is the year that Northern Crusades: Grand Duchy of Lithuania and the Teutonic Knights meet in the Battle of Rudau.
year.1332: is the year that Amda Seyon I, Emperor of Ethiopia begins his campaigns in the southern Muslim provinces.
year.1268: is the year that The Battle of Wesenberg is fought between the Livonian Order and Dovmont of Pskov.
year.-3102: is the year that Kali Yuga, the fourth and final yuga of Hinduism, starts with the death of Krishna.
year.1836: is the year that King William IV signs Letters Patent establishing the province of South Australia.
year.1714: is the year that Great Northern War: The battle of Napue between Sweden and Russia is fought in Isokyrö, Ostrobothnia.
year.1594: is the year that Having already been elected to the throne of the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth in 1587, Sigismund III of the House of Vasa is crowned King of Sweden, having succeeded his father John III of Sweden in 1592.
year.607: is the year that Pope Boniface III is consecrated in Rome.
year.356: is the year that The anti-paganism policy of Constantius II forbids the worship of pagan idols in the Roman Empire.
year.197: is the year that Emperor Septimius Severus defeats usurper Clodius Albinus in the Battle of Lugdunum, the bloodiest battle between Roman armies.
year.1553: is the year that Yohannan Sulaqa professes his Catholic belief and is ordained as bishop shortly after; this marks the beginning of the Chaldean Catholic Church.
year.1472: is the year that Orkney and Shetland are pawned by Norway to Scotland in lieu of a dowry for Margaret of Denmark.
year.1339: is the year that The Milanese army and the St. George's (San Giorgio) Mercenaries of Lodrisio Visconti clash in the Battle of Parabiago; Visconti is defeated.
year.1440: is the year that The Prussian Confederation is formed.
year.1245: is the year that Thomas, the first known Bishop of Finland, is granted resignation after confessing to torture and forgery.
year.1770: is the year that British customs officer Ebenezer Richardson fires blindly into a crowd during a protest in North End, Boston, fatally wounding 11-year-old Christopher Seider; the first American fatality of the American Revolution.
year.1744: is the year that War of the Austrian Succession: The Battle of Toulon causes several Royal Navy captains to be court-martialed, and the Articles of War to be amended.
year.1632: is the year that Ferdinando II de' Medici, Grand Duke of Tuscany, the dedicatee, receives the first printed copy of Galileo's Dialogue Concerning the Two Chief World Systems.
year.1495: is the year that King Charles VIII of France enters Naples to claim the city's throne.
year.1371: is the year that Robert II becomes King of Scotland, beginning the Stuart dynasty.
year.1316: is the year that The Battle of Picotin, between Ferdinand of Majorca and the forces of Matilda of Hainaut, ends in victory for Ferdinand.
year.1288: is the year that The Franciscan Girolamo Maschi is elected pope, choosing the name Nicholas IV.
year.1076: is the year that Having received a letter during the Lenten synod of 14–20 February demanding that he abdicate, Pope Gregory VII excommunicates Henry IV, Holy Roman Emperor.
year.896: is the year that Pope Formosus crowns Arnulf of Carinthia as Emperor in Rome. Arnulf suffers a stroke soon after and retreats from Italy.
year.1455: is the year that Traditionally the date of publication of the Gutenberg Bible, the first Western book printed with movable type.
year.705: is the year that Empress Wu Zetian abdicates the throne, restoring the Tang dynasty.
year.628: is the year that Khosrow II, Shahanshah of the Sasanian Empire, is overthrown.
year.303: is the year that Roman emperor Diocletian orders the destruction of the Christian church in Nicomedia, beginning eight years of Diocletianic Persecution.
year.1821: is the year that Final stage of the Mexican War of Independence from Spain with Plan of Iguala.
year.1803: is the year that In Marbury v. Madison, the Supreme Court of the United States establishes the principle of judicial review.
year.1711: is the year that Rinaldo by George Frideric Handel, the first Italian opera written for the London stage, is premièred.
year.1538: is the year that Treaty of Nagyvárad between Holy Roman Emperor Ferdinand I and King John Zápolya of Hungary and Croatia.
year.1386: is the year that King Charles III of Naples and Hungary is assassinated at Buda.
year.1303: is the year that The English are defeated at the Battle of Roslin, in the First War of Scottish Independence.
year.484: is the year that King Huneric of the Vandals replaces Nicene bishops with Arian ones, and banishes some to Corsica.
year.1705: is the year that George Frideric Handel's opera Nero premieres in Hamburg.
year.138: is the year that Roman emperor Hadrian adopts Antoninus Pius as his son, effectively making him his successor.
year.1074: is the year that Battle of Kemej: The royal army of Solomon, King of Hungary defeats the force of his rebellious cousin Duke Géza.
year.364: is the year that Valentinian I is proclaimed Roman Emperor.
year.320: is the year that Chandragupta I is officially crowned as the first Gupta Emperor.
year.-747: is the year that According to Ptolemy, the epoch (origin) of the Nabonassar Era began at noon on this date. Historians use this to establish the modern BC chronology for dating historic events.
year.1626: is the year that Yuan Chonghuan is appointed Governor of Liaodong, after leading the Chinese into a great victory against the Manchurians under Nurhaci.
year.1617: is the year that Sweden and the Tsardom of Russia sign the Treaty of Stolbovo, ending the Ingrian War and shutting Russia out of the Baltic Sea.
year.1560: is the year that The Treaty of Berwick is signed by England and the Lords of the Congregation of Scotland, establishing the terms under which English armed forces were to be permitted in Scotland in order to expel occupying French troops.
year.907: is the year that Abaoji, chieftain of the Yila tribe, is named khagan of the Khitans.
year.425: is the year that The University of Constantinople is founded by Emperor Theodosius II at the urging of his wife Aelia Eudocia.
year.380: is the year that Edict of Thessalonica: Emperor Theodosius I and his co-emperors Gratian and Valentinian II declare their wish that all Roman citizens convert to Nicene Christianity.
year.1638: is the year that The Scottish National Covenant is signed in Edinburgh.
year.870: is the year that The Fourth Council of Constantinople closes.
year.-202: is the year that Liu Bang is enthroned as the Emperor of China, beginning four centuries of rule by the Han dynasty.
year.1768: is the year that Polish nobles form the Bar Confederation.
year.1644: is the year that Abel Tasman's second Pacific voyage begins as he leaves Batavia in command of three ships.
year.888: is the year that Odo, count of Paris, is crowned king of West Francia (France) by Archbishop Walter of Sens at Compiègne.
year.1628: is the year that Writs issued in February by Charles I of England mandate that every county in England (not just seaport towns) pay ship tax by this date.
year.1476: is the year that Forces of the Catholic Monarchs engage the combined Portuguese-Castilian armies of Afonso V and Prince John at the Battle of Toro.
year.1290: is the year that University of Coimbra, in Portugal, is officially chartered by King Denis.
year.834: is the year that Emperor Louis the Pious is restored as sole ruler of the Frankish Empire.
year.293: is the year that Emperor Diocletian and Maximian appoint Constantius Chlorus and Galerius as Caesars. This is considered the beginning of the Tetrarchy, known as the Quattuor Principes Mundi ("Four Rulers of the World").
year.-509: is the year that Publius Valerius Publicola celebrates the first triumph of the Roman Republic after his victory over the deposed king Lucius Tarquinius Superbus at the Battle of Silva Arsia.
year.1882: is the year that Queen Victoria narrowly escapes an assassination attempt by Roderick Maclean in Windsor.
year.1657: is the year that The Great Fire of Meireki begins in Edo (now Tokyo), Japan, causing more than 100,000 deaths before it exhausts itself three days later.
year.1498: is the year that Vasco da Gama's fleet visits the Island of Mozambique.
year.1484: is the year that The College of Arms is formally incorporated by Royal Charter signed by King Richard III of England.
year.1331: is the year that Fall of Nicaea to the Ottoman Turks after a siege.
year.986: is the year that Louis V becomes the last Carolingian king of West Francia after the death of his father, Lothaire.
year.537: is the year that Siege of Rome: The Ostrogoth army under king Vitiges begins the siege of the capital. Belisarius conducts a delaying action outside the Flaminian Gate; he and a detachment of his bucellarii are almost cut off.
year.724: is the year that Empress Genshō abdicates the throne in favor of her nephew Shōmu who becomes emperor of Japan.
year.473: is the year that Gundobad (nephew of Ricimer) nominates Glycerius as emperor of the Western Roman Empire.
year.1766: is the year that Antonio de Ulloa, the first Spanish governor of Louisiana, arrives in New Orleans.
year.1496: is the year that King Henry VII of England issues letters patent to John Cabot and his sons, authorising them to explore unknown lands.
year.1279: is the year that The Livonian Order is defeated in the Battle of Aizkraukle by the Grand Duchy of Lithuania.
year.1046: is the year that Nasir Khusraw begins the seven-year Middle Eastern journey which he will later describe in his book Safarnama.
year.363: is the year that Roman emperor Julian leaves Antioch with an army of 90,000 to attack the Sasanian Empire, in a campaign which would bring about his own death.
year.1447: is the year that Election of Pope Nicholas V following the death of Pope Eugene IV on 23 February 1447.
year.1323: is the year that Treaty of Paris of 1323 is signed.
year.1204: is the year that The Siege of Château Gaillard ends in a French victory over King John of England, who loses control of Normandy to King Philip II Augustus.
year.845: is the year that The 42 Martyrs of Amorium are killed after refusing to convert to Islam.
year.-12: is the year that The Roman emperor Augustus is named Pontifex Maximus, incorporating the position into that of the emperor.
year.1277: is the year that The University of Paris issues the last in a series of condemnations of various philosophical and theological theses.
year.1138: is the year that Konrad III von Hohenstaufen is elected king of Germany at Coblenz in the presence of the papal legate Theodwin.
year.161: is the year that Marcus Aurelius and L. Commodus (who changes his name to Lucius Verus) become joint emperors of Rome on the death of Antoninus Pius.
year.1736: is the year that Nader Shah, founder of the Afsharid dynasty, is crowned Shah of Iran.
year.1722: is the year that The Safavid Empire of Iran is defeated by an army from Afghanistan at the Battle of Gulnabad.
year.1702: is the year that Queen Anne, the younger sister of Mary II, becomes Queen regnant of England, Scotland, and Ireland.
year.1658: is the year that Treaty of Roskilde: After a devastating defeat in the Northern Wars (1655–1661), Frederick III, the King of Denmark–Norway is forced to give up nearly half his territory to Sweden.
year.1262: is the year that Battle of Hausbergen between bourgeois militias and the army of the bishop of Strasbourg.
year.1010: is the year that Ferdowsi completes his epic poem Shahnameh.
year.1230: is the year that Bulgarian Tsar Ivan Asen II defeats Theodore of Epirus in the Battle of Klokotnitsa.
year.1226: is the year that Khwarazmian sultan Jalal ad-Din conquers the Georgian capital of Tbilisi.
year.1044: is the year that The people of Constantinople riot against emperor Constantine IX Monomachos, whose preference of his mistress Maria Skleraina over empress Zoe Porphyrogenita is seen as an insult.
year.1009: is the year that First known mention of Lithuania, in the annals of the monastery of Quedlinburg.
year.-141: is the year that Liu Che, posthumously known as Emperor Wu of Han, assumes the throne over the Han dynasty of China.
year.1629: is the year that Charles I dissolves the Parliament of England, beginning the eleven-year period known as the Personal Rule.
year.298: is the year that Roman Emperor Maximian concludes his campaign in North Africa and makes a triumphal entry into Carthage.
year.-241: is the year that First Punic War: Battle of the Aegates: The Romans sink the Carthaginian fleet bringing the First Punic War to an end.
year.1387: is the year that Battle of Castagnaro: Padua, led by John Hawkwood, is victorious over Giovanni Ordelaffi of Verona.
year.843: is the year that Triumph of Orthodoxy: Empress Theodora II restores the veneration of icons in the Orthodox churches in the Byzantine Empire.
year.1622: is the year that Ignatius of Loyola and Francis Xavier, founders of the Society of Jesus, are canonized by the Roman Catholic Church.
year.1391: is the year that Konrad von Wallenrode is elected the 24th Grand Master of the Teutonic Order (date is O.S.).
year.1088: is the year that Election of Urban II as the 159th Pope of the Catholic Church. He is best known for initiating the Crusades.
year.538: is the year that Vitiges, king of the Ostrogoths, ends his siege of Rome and retreats to Ravenna, leaving the city to the victorious Byzantine general, Belisarius.
year.1741: is the year that The Battle of Cartagena de Indias (part of the War of Jenkins' Ear) begins.
year.1697: is the year that Nojpetén, capital of the last independent Maya kingdom, falls to Spanish conquistadors, the final step in the Spanish conquest of Guatemala.
year.1261: is the year that The Byzantine Empire and the Republic of Genoa sign a permanent treaty against the Venetians at Nymphaeum.
year.624: is the year that The Battle of Badr, the first major battle between the Muslims and Quraysh.
year.483: is the year that Election of Pope Felix III following the death of Pope Simplicius earlier that month.
year.222: is the year that Roman emperor Elagabalus is murdered alongside his mother, Julia Soaemias. He is replaced by his 14-year old cousin, Severus Alexander.
year.1663: is the year that According to his own account, Otto von Guericke completes his book Experimenta Nova (ut vocantur) Magdeburgica de Vacuo Spatio, detailing his experiments on vacuum and his discovery of electrostatic repulsion.
year.1647: is the year that Thirty Years' War: Bavaria, Cologne, France and Sweden sign the Truce of Ulm.
year.1590: is the year that Battle of Ivry: Henry of Navarre and the Huguenots defeat the forces of the Catholic League under Charles, Duke of Mayenne, during the French Wars of Religion.
year.1672: is the year that King Charles II of England issues the Royal Declaration of Indulgence, granting limited religious freedom to all Christians.
year.1412: is the year that Treaty of Lublowa: After the Peace of Thorn, Grand Master Heinrich von Plauen asks Sigismund of Hungary for economic aid. Sigismund agrees to mediate reduction to the third installment, demarcation of the Samogitian border, and other matters with a grand tournament. Hunts and lavish feasts were also organized. Sigismund invited, among others, polish king Wladyslaw Jagiello, Heinrich von Plauen and bosnian king Tvrtko II. There were people from 17 countries and languages - 40.000 nobles and 2000 knights were present from all over Europe, even England.
year.1311: is the year that Battle of Halmyros: The Catalan Company defeats Walter V, Count of Brienne to take control of the Duchy of Athens, a Crusader state in Greece.
year.933: is the year that After a ten-year truce, German King Henry the Fowler defeats a Hungarian army at the Battle of Riade near the Unstrut river.
year.897: is the year that Al-Hadi ila'l-Haqq Yahya enters Sa'dah and founds the Zaydi Imamate of Yemen.
year.856: is the year that Michael III, emperor of the Byzantine Empire, overthrows the regency of his mother, empress Theodora (wife of Theophilos) with support of the Byzantine nobility.
year.493: is the year that Odoacer, the first barbarian King of Italy after the fall of the Western Roman Empire, is slain by Theoderic the Great, king of the Ostrogoths, while the two kings were feasting together.
year.351: is the year that Constantius Gallus is elevated as Caesar and then sent to Antioch to govern the Roman East.
year.-44: is the year that The assassination of Julius Caesar, the dictator of the Roman Republic, by a group of senators takes place on the Ides of March.
year.-200: is the year that The Roman Republic under its new consuls Publius Sulpicius Galba and Gaius Aurelius Cotta declares war on Philip V of Macedon, starting the Second Macedonian War.
year.-474: is the year that Roman consul Aulus Manlius Vulso celebrates an ovation for concluding the war against Veii and securing a forty years' truce.
year.1802: is the year that The Army Corps of Engineers is established to found and operate the United States Military Academy at West Point.
year.1696: is the year that The Dutch bombard Givet during the Nine Years' War.
year.1244: is the year that Over 200 Cathars who refuse to recant are burnt to death after the Fall of Montségur.
year.1190: is the year that Massacre of Jews at Clifford's Tower, York.
year.445: is the year that Western Roman Emperor Valentinian III is assassinated  while practising on the Campus Martius on behalf of Petronius Maximus.
year.-597: is the year that The first siege of Jerusalem by the Neo-Babylonian Empire ends with the city surrendering to king Nebuchadnezzar II.
year.1400: is the year that Turko-Mongol emperor Timur sacks Damascus.
year.1337: is the year that Edward the Black Prince is made Duke of Cornwall, the first duchy in England.
year.455: is the year that Petronius Maximus becomes, with support of the Roman Senate, emperor of the Western Roman Empire; he forces Licinia Eudoxia, the widow of his predecessor, Valentinian III, to marry him.
year.180: is the year that Commodus becomes sole emperor of the Roman Empire at the age of eighteen, following the death of his father, Marcus Aurelius.
year.1673: is the year that English lord John Berkeley sells his half of New Jersey to the Quakers.
year.1314: is the year that Jacques de Molay, the 23rd and final Grand Master of the Knights Templar, is burned at the stake.
year.1241: is the year that First Mongol invasion of Poland: Mongols overwhelm Polish armies in Kraków in the Battle of Chmielnik and plunder the city.
year.37: is the year that Roman Senate annuls Tiberius' will and proclaims Gaius Julius Caesar Augustus Germanicus (aka Caligula = Little Boots) emperor.
year.1687: is the year that Explorer Robert Cavelier de La Salle, searching for the mouth of the Mississippi River, is murdered by his own men.
year.1563: is the year that The Edict of Amboise is signed, ending the first phase of the French Wars of Religion and granting certain freedoms to the Huguenots.
year.1452: is the year that Frederick III of Habsburg is the last Holy Roman Emperor crowned by medieval tradition in Rome by Pope Nicholas V.
year.1284: is the year that The Statute of Rhuddlan incorporates the Principality of Wales into England.
year.1227: is the year that Election of Ugolino di Conti as Pope Gregory IX following the death of Pope Honorius III.
year.1602: is the year that The Dutch East India Company is established.
year.1206: is the year that Michael IV Autoreianos is appointed Ecumenical Patriarch of Constantinople.
year.1800: is the year that With the church leadership driven out of Rome during an armed conflict, Pius VII is crowned Pope in Venice with a temporary papal tiara made of papier-mâché.
year.1180: is the year that Emperor Antoku accedes to the throne of Japan.
year.1152: is the year that Annulment of the marriage of King Louis VII of France and Queen Eleanor of Aquitaine.
year.717: is the year that Battle of Vincy between Charles Martel and Ragenfrid.
year.1668: is the year that Notable Privateer Henry Morgan lands in Cuba to raid and plunder the inland town of Puerto del Príncipe during the latter stages of the Anglo-Spanish War (1654–1660).
year.1631: is the year that The Massachusetts Bay Colony outlaws the possession of cards, dice, and gaming tables.
year.1508: is the year that Ferdinand II of Aragon commissions Amerigo Vespucci chief navigator of the Spanish Empire.
year.1312: is the year that Vox in excelso: Pope Clement V dissolves the Order of the Knights Templar.
year.1185: is the year that Battle of Yashima: the Japanese forces of the Taira clan are defeated by the Minamoto clan.
year.235: is the year that Roman emperor Severus Alexander is murdered, marking the start of the Crisis of the Third Century.
year.106: is the year that Start of the Bostran era, the calendar of the province of Arabia Petraea.
year.625: is the year that The Muslim army under Muhammad suffers a defeat against the Quraysh in the battle of Uhud.
year.1603: is the year that James VI of Scotland is proclaimed King James I of England and Ireland, upon the death of Elizabeth I.
year.1199: is the year that King Richard I of England is wounded by a crossbow bolt while fighting in France, leading to his death on April 6.
year.1519: is the year that Hernán Cortés, entering province of Tabasco, defeats Tabascan Indians.
year.1410: is the year that The Yongle Emperor of Ming China launches the first of his military campaigns against the Mongols, resulting in the fall of the Mongol khan Bunyashiri.
year.1409: is the year that The Council of Pisa convenes, in an attempt to heal the Western Schism.
year.1221: is the year that Coronation of Robert of Courtenay as Emperor of the Latin Empire.
year.1065: is the year that The Great German Pilgrimage is attacked on Good Friday by Beduin bandits, suffering heavy losses.
year.1000: is the year that Fatimid caliph al-Hakim bi-Amr Allah assassinates the eunuch chief minister Barjawan and assumes control of the government.
year.919: is the year that Romanos Lekapenos seizes the Boukoleon Palace in Constantinople and becomes regent of the Byzantine emperor Constantine VII.
year.708: is the year that Election of Pope Constantine following the death of Pope Sisinnius. He would be the last pope to visit Constantinople until 1967.
year.410: is the year that The Southern Yan capital of Guanggu falls to the Jin dynasty general Liu Yu, ending the Southern Yan dynasty.
year.1640: is the year that The Royal Academy of Turku, the first university of Finland, is founded in the city of Turku by Queen Christina of Sweden at the proposal of Count Per Brahe.
year.1636: is the year that Utrecht University is founded in the Netherlands.
year.1552: is the year that Guru Amar Das becomes the Third Sikh guru.
year.1351: is the year that Combat of the Thirty: Thirty Breton knights call out and defeat thirty English knights.
year.1344: is the year that The Siege of Algeciras, one of the first European military engagements where gunpowder was used, comes to an end.
year.1027: is the year that Pope John XIX crowns Conrad II as Holy Roman Emperor.
year.1021: is the year that The death of the Fatimid caliph al-Hakim bi-Amr Allah, kept secret for six weeks, is announced, along with the succession of his son, al-Zahir li-i'zaz Din Allah.
year.752: is the year that Election of Pope Stephen II following the death of Pope Zachary.
year.1625: is the year that Charles I becomes King of England, Scotland and Ireland as well as claiming the title King of France.
year.1513: is the year that Spanish explorer Juan Ponce de León reaches the northern end of The Bahamas on his first voyage to Florida.
year.1329: is the year that Pope John XXII issues his In Agro Dominico condemning some writings of Meister Eckhart as heretical.
year.1309: is the year that Pope Clement V imposes excommunication and interdiction on Venice, and a general prohibition of all commercial intercourse with Venice, which had seized Ferrara, a papal fiefdom.
year.1745: is the year that War of the Austrian Succession: In the Battle of Vilshofen, Austrian forces defeat French forces.
year.1566: is the year that The foundation stone of Valletta, Malta's capital city, is laid by Jean Parisot de Valette, Grand Master of the Sovereign Military Order of Malta.
year.1549: is the year that The city of Salvador, Bahia, the first capital of Brazil, is founded.
year.1139: is the year that Pope Innocent II issues the bull Omne datum optimum in which he endorses the Knights Templar and approves the Templar Rule.
year.1296: is the year that Edward I sacks Berwick-upon-Tweed, during armed conflict between Scotland and England.
year.1282: is the year that The people of Sicily rebel against the Angevin king Charles I, in what becomes known as the Sicilian Vespers.
