year.598: is the year that Avar–Byzantine wars: The Avars lift the siege at the Byzantine stronghold of Tomis. Their leader Bayan I retreats north of the Danube River after the Avaro-Slavic army is decimated by the plague.
year.1174: is the year that A conspiracy against Saladin, aiming to restore the Fatimid Caliphate, is revealed in Cairo, involving senior figures of the former Fatimid regime and the poet Umara al-Yamani. Modern historians doubt the extent and danger of the conspiracy reported in official sources, but its ringleaders will be publicly executed over the following weeks.
year.1146: is the year that Bernard of Clairvaux preaches his famous sermon in a field at Vézelay, urging the necessity of a Second Crusade. Louis VII is present, and joins the Crusade.
year.1081: is the year that Alexios I Komnenos overthrows the Byzantine emperor Nikephoros III Botaneiates, and, after his troops spend three days extensively looting Constantinople, is formally crowned on April 4.
year.527: is the year that Byzantine Emperor Justin I names his nephew Justinian I as co-ruler and successor to the throne.
year.1589: is the year that The janissaries revolt in response to the debasement of coins.
year.1043: is the year that Edward the Confessor is crowned King of England.
year.686: is the year that Maya king Yuknoom Yich'aak K'ahk' assumes the crown of Calakmul.
year.1581: is the year that Francis Drake is knighted by Queen Elizabeth I for completing a circumnavigation of the world.
year.1423: is the year that Death of the Venetian Doge Tommaso Mocenigo, under whose rule victories were achieved against the Kingdom of Hungary and against the Ottoman Empire at the Battle of Gallipoli (1416).
year.801: is the year that King Louis the Pious captures Barcelona from the Moors after a siege of several months.
year.619: is the year that The Bijapur-Mumbai inscription is issued by Pulakeshin II, describing the Battle of Narmada.: 207
year.611: is the year that Maya king Uneh Chan of Calakmul sacks rival city-state Palenque in southern Mexico.
year.190: is the year that Dong Zhuo has his troops evacuate the capital Luoyang and burn it to the ground.
year.-503: is the year that Roman consul Agrippa Menenius Lanatus celebrates a triumph for a military victory over the Sabines.
year.1614: is the year that In Virginia, Native American Pocahontas marries English colonist John Rolfe.
year.1242: is the year that During the Battle on the Ice of Lake Peipus, Russian forces, led by Alexander Nevsky, rebuff an invasion attempt by the Teutonic Knights.
year.823: is the year that Lothair I is crowned King of Italy by Pope Paschal I.
year.1652: is the year that At the Cape of Good Hope, Dutch sailor Jan van Riebeeck establishes a resupply camp that eventually becomes Cape Town.
year.1580: is the year that One of the largest earthquakes recorded in the history of England, Flanders, or Northern France, takes place.
year.1453: is the year that Mehmed II begins his siege of Constantinople. The city falls on May 29 and is renamed Istanbul.
year.402: is the year that Stilicho defeats the Visigoths under Alaric in the Battle of Pollentia.
year.1767: is the year that End of Burmese–Siamese War (1765–1767).
year.529: is the year that First Corpus Juris Civilis, a fundamental work in jurisprudence, is issued by Eastern Roman Emperor Justinian I.
year.451: is the year that Attila the Hun captures Metz in France, killing most of its inhabitants and burning the town.
year.1730: is the year that Shearith Israel, the first synagogue in continental North America, is dedicated.
year.1271: is the year that In Syria, sultan Baibars conquers the Krak des Chevaliers.
year.1232: is the year that Mongol–Jin War: The Mongols begin their siege on Kaifeng, the capital of the Jin dynasty.
year.876: is the year that The Battle of Dayr al-'Aqul saves Baghdad from the Saffarids.
year.217: is the year that Roman emperor Caracalla is assassinated and is succeeded by his Praetorian Guard prefect, Marcus Opellius Macrinus.
year.1682: is the year that Robert Cavelier de La Salle discovers the mouth of the Mississippi River, claims it for France and names it Louisiana.
year.1388: is the year that Despite being outnumbered 16:1, forces of the Old Swiss Confederacy are victorious over the Archduchy of Austria in the Battle of Näfels.
year.1710: is the year that The Statute of Anne, the first law regulating copyright, comes into force in Great Britain.
year.1545: is the year that The settlement of Villa Imperial de Carlos V (now the city of Potosí) in Bolivia is founded after the discovery of huge silver deposits in the area.
year.1407: is the year that Deshin Shekpa, 5th Karmapa Lama visits the Ming dynasty capital at Nanjing and is awarded the title "Great Treasure Prince of Dharma".
year.837: is the year that Halley's Comet makes its closest approach to Earth at a distance equal to 0.0342 AU (5.1 million kilometres/3.2 million miles).
year.428: is the year that Nestorius becomes the Patriarch of Constantinople.
year.1727: is the year that Premiere of Johann Sebastian Bach's St Matthew Passion BWV 244b at St. Thomas Church in Leipzig, Electorate of Saxony (now Germany).
year.1544: is the year that Italian War of 1542–46: A French army defeats Habsburg forces at the Battle of Ceresole, but fails to exploit its victory.
year.1512: is the year that War of the League of Cambrai: Franco-Ferrarese forces led by Gaston de Foix and Alfonso I d'Este win the Battle of Ravenna against the Papal-Spanish forces.
year.491: is the year that Flavius Anastasius becomes Byzantine emperor, with the name of Anastasius I.
year.1012: is the year that Duke Oldřich of Bohemia deposes and blinds his brother Jaromír, who flees to Poland.[citation needed]
year.627: is the year that King Edwin of Northumbria is converted to Christianity by Paulinus, Bishop of York.
year.467: is the year that Anthemius is elevated to Emperor of the Western Roman Empire.
year.240: is the year that Shapur I becomes co-emperor of the Sasanian Empire with his father Ardashir I.
year.1612: is the year that Samurai Miyamoto Musashi defeats Sasaki Kojirō in a duel at Funajima island.
year.1175: is the year that Saladin routs his Muslim opponents, the Zengids, in the battle of the Horns of Hama, consolidating his control over Syria except for Aleppo.
year.1111: is the year that Henry V, King of Germany, is crowned Holy Roman Emperor.
year.1561: is the year that A celestial phenomenon is reported over Nuremberg, described as an aerial battle.
year.1471: is the year that In England, the Yorkists under Edward IV defeat the Lancastrians under the Earl of Warwick at the Battle of Barnet; the Earl is killed and Edward resumes the throne.
year.1395: is the year that Tokhtamysh–Timur war: At the Battle of the Terek River, Timur defeats the army of the Golden Horde, beginning the khanate's permanent military decline.
year.972: is the year that Otto II, Co-Emperor of the Holy Roman Empire, marries Byzantine princess Theophanu. She is crowned empress by Pope John XIII in Rome the same day.
year.966: is the year that Following his marriage to the Christian Doubravka of Bohemia, the pagan ruler of the Polans, Mieszko I, converts to Christianity, an event considered to be the founding of the Polish state.
year.-43: is the year that Legions loyal to the Roman Senate, commanded by Gaius Pansa, defeat the forces of Mark Antony in the Battle of Forum Gallorum.
year.1715: is the year that The Pocotaligo Massacre triggers the start of the Yamasee War in colonial South Carolina.
year.1450: is the year that Battle of Formigny: Toward the end of the Hundred Years' War, the French attack and nearly annihilate English forces, ending English domination in Northern France.
year.1071: is the year that Bari, the last Byzantine possession in southern Italy, is surrendered to Robert Guiscard.
year.769: is the year that The Lateran Council ends by condemning the Council of Hieria and anathematizing its iconoclastic rulings.
year.1346: is the year that Stefan Dušan, "the Mighty", is crowned Emperor of the Serbs at Skopje, his empire occupying much of the Balkans.
year.682: is the year that Pope Leo II is elected head of the Catholic Church, although he will not be consecrated until 17 August.
year.73: is the year that Masada, a Jewish fortress, falls to the Romans after several months of siege, ending the First Jewish–Roman War.
year.-1457: is the year that Battle of Megido – the first battle to have been recorded in what is accepted as relatively reliable detail.
year.1080: is the year that Harald III of Denmark dies and is succeeded by Canute IV, who would later be the first Dane to be canonized.
year.1518: is the year that Bona Sforza is crowned as queen consort of Poland.
year.796: is the year that King Æthelred I of Northumbria is murdered in Corbridge by a group led by his ealdormen, Ealdred and Wada. The patrician Osbald is crowned, but abdicates within 27 days.
year.1677: is the year that The French army captures the town of Cambrai held by Spanish troops.
year.1529: is the year that Beginning of the Protestant Reformation: After the Second Diet of Speyer bans Lutheranism, a group of rulers (German: Fürst) and independent cities protest the reinstatement of the Edict of Worms.
year.531: is the year that Battle of Callinicum: A Byzantine army under Belisarius is defeated by the Persians at Raqqa (northern Syria).
year.65: is the year that The freedman Milichus betrays Piso's plot to kill the Emperor Nero and all of the conspirators are arrested.
year.1752: is the year that Start of Konbaung–Hanthawaddy War, a new phase in the Burmese Civil War (1740–57).
year.1615: is the year that The Wignacourt Aqueduct is inaugurated in Malta.
year.1526: is the year that The last ruler of the Lodi dynasty, Ibrahim Lodi is defeated and killed by Babur in the First Battle of Panipat.
year.1092: is the year that The Diocese of Pisa is elevated to the rank of metropolitan archdiocese by Pope Urban II
year.900: is the year that The Laguna Copperplate Inscription (the earliest known written document found in what is now the Philippines): the Commander-in-Chief of the Kingdom of Tondo, as represented by the Honourable Jayadewa, Lord Minister of Pailah, pardons from all debt the Honourable Namwaran and his relations.
year.-753: is the year that Romulus founds Rome (traditional date).
year.1635: is the year that The first public school in the United States, the Boston Latin School, is founded.
year.1516: is the year that The Munich Reinheitsgebot (regarding the ingredients of beer) takes effect in all of Bavaria.
year.1016: is the year that Edmund Ironside succeeds his father Æthelred the Unready as King of England.
year.711: is the year that Dagobert III succeeds his father King Childebert III as King of the Franks.
year.599: is the year that Maya king Uneh Chan of Calakmul attacks rival city-state Palenque in southern Mexico, defeating queen Yohl Ik'nal and sacking the city.
year.-215: is the year that A temple is built on the Capitoline Hill dedicated to Venus Erycina to commemorate the Roman defeat at Lake Trasimene.
year.-1183: is the year that Traditional reckoning of the Fall of Troy marking the end of the legendary Trojan War, given by chief librarian of the Library of Alexandria Eratosthenes, among others.
year.-1479: is the year that Thutmose III ascends to the throne of Egypt, although power effectively shifts to Hatshepsut (according to the Low Chronology of the 18th dynasty).
year.1134: is the year that The name Zagreb was mentioned for the first time in the Felician Charter relating to the establishment of the Zagreb Bishopric around 1094.
year.799: is the year that After mistreatment and disfigurement by the citizens of Rome, Pope Leo III flees to the Frankish court of king Charlemagne at Paderborn for protection.
year.775: is the year that The Battle of Bagrevand puts an end to an Armenian rebellion against the Abbasid Caliphate. Muslim control over the South Caucasus is solidified and its Islamization begins, while several major Armenian nakharar families lose power and their remnants flee to the Byzantine Empire.
year.-404: is the year that Admiral Lysander and King Pausanias of Sparta blockade Athens and bring the Peloponnesian War to a successful conclusion.
year.1478: is the year that The Pazzi family attack on Lorenzo de' Medici in order to displace the ruling Medici family kills his brother Giuliano during High Mass in Florence Cathedral.
year.1336: is the year that Francesco Petrarca (Petrarch) ascends Mont Ventoux.
year.395: is the year that Emperor Arcadius marries Aelia Eudoxia, daughter of the Frankish general Flavius Bauto. She becomes one of the more powerful Roman empresses of Late Antiquity.
year.247: is the year that Philip the Arab marks the millennium of Rome with a celebration of the ludi saeculares.
year.1611: is the year that Establishment of the Pontifical and Royal University of Santo Tomas, the Catholic University of the Philippines and the largest Catholic university in the world.
year.1294: is the year that Temür, grandson of Kublai, is elected Khagan of the Mongols with the reigning title Oljeitu.
year.1253: is the year that Nichiren, a Japanese Buddhist monk, propounds Namu Myōhō Renge Kyō for the first time and declares it to be the essence of Buddhism, in effect founding Nichiren Buddhism.
year.1192: is the year that Assassination of Conrad of Montferrat (Conrad I), King of Jerusalem, in Tyre, two days after his title to the throne is confirmed by election. The killing is carried out by Hashshashin.
year.357: is the year that Emperor Constantius II enters Rome for the first time to celebrate his victory over Magnus Magnentius.
year.224: is the year that The Battle of Hormozdgan is fought. Ardashir I defeats and kills Artabanus V, effectively ending the Parthian Empire.
year.1483: is the year that Gran Canaria, the main island of the Canary Islands, is conquered by the Kingdom of Castile.
year.1091: is the year that Battle of Levounion: The Pechenegs are defeated by Byzantine Emperor Alexios I Komnenos.
year.1598: is the year that Juan de Oñate begins the conquest of Santa Fe de Nuevo México.
year.1315: is the year that Enguerrand de Marigny is hanged at the instigation of Charles, Count of Valois.
year.311: is the year that The Diocletianic Persecution of Christians in the Roman Empire ends.
year.1669: is the year that Henry Morgan's raid on Lake Maracaibo, the Spanish Armada de Barlovento is defeated by an English Privateer fleet led by Captain Henry Morgan.
year.1328: is the year that Wars of Scottish Independence end: By the Treaty of Edinburgh–Northampton, England recognises Scotland as an independent state.
year.305: is the year that Diocletian and Maximian retire from the office of Roman emperor.
year.1194: is the year that King Richard I of England gives Portsmouth its first royal charter.
year.1491: is the year that Kongo monarch Nkuwu Nzinga is baptised by Portuguese missionaries, adopting the baptismal name of João I.
year.1481: is the year that The largest of three earthquakes strikes the island of Rhodes and causes an estimated 30,000 casualties.
year.1436: is the year that Assassination of the Swedish rebel (later national hero) Engelbrekt Engelbrektsson (27 April O.S.).
year.1415: is the year that Religious reformer John Wycliffe is condemned as a heretic at the Council of Constance.
year.1256: is the year that The Augustinian monastic order is constituted at the Lecceto Monastery when Pope Alexander IV issues a papal bull Licet ecclesiae catholicae.
year.1260: is the year that Kublai Khan becomes ruler of the Mongol Empire.
year.1215: is the year that Rebel barons renounce their allegiance to King John of England — part of a chain of events leading to the signing of the Magna Carta.
year.553: is the year that The Second Council of Constantinople begins.
year.1718: is the year that The city of New Orleans is founded by Jean-Baptiste Le Moyne, Sieur de Bienville.
year.1664: is the year that Inaugural celebrations begin at Louis XIV's new Palace of Versailles.
year.1487: is the year that The Siege of Málaga commences during the Spanish Reconquista.
year.1342: is the year that In Avignon, France, Cardinal Pierre Roger is elected Pope and takes the name Clement VI.
year.1274: is the year that In France, the Second Council of Lyon opens; it ratified a decree to regulate the election of the Pope.
year.558: is the year that In Constantinople, the dome of the Hagia Sophia collapses, twenty years after its construction. Justinian I immediately orders that the dome be rebuilt.
year.1373: is the year that Julian of Norwich, a Christian mystic and anchoress, experiences the deathbed visions described in her Revelations of Divine Love.
year.1360: is the year that Treaty of Brétigny drafted between King Edward III of England and King John II of France (the Good).
year.589: is the year that Reccared I opens the Third Council of Toledo, marking the entry of Visigothic Spain into the Catholic Church.
year.413: is the year that Emperor Honorius signs an edict providing tax relief for the Italian provinces Tuscia, Campania, Picenum, Samnium, Apulia, Lucania and Calabria, which were plundered by the Visigoths.
year.-453: is the year that Spring and Autumn period: The house of Zhao defeats the house of Zhi, ending the Battle of Jinyang, a military conflict between the elite families of the State of Jin.
year.328: is the year that Athanasius is elected Patriarch of Alexandria.
year.1688: is the year that King Narai nominates Phetracha as regent, leading to the revolution of 1688 in which Phetracha becomes king of the Ayutthaya Kingdom.
year.1291: is the year that Scottish nobles recognize the authority of Edward I of England pending the selection of a king.
year.-28: is the year that A sunspot is observed by Han dynasty astronomers during the reign of Emperor Cheng of Han, one of the earliest dated sunspot observations in China.
year.973: is the year that In the first coronation ceremony ever held for an English monarch, Edgar the Peaceful is crowned King of England, having ruled since 959 AD. His wife, Ælfthryth, is crowned queen, the first recorded coronation for a Queen of England.
year.868: is the year that A copy of the Diamond Sūtra is published, the earliest dated and printed book known.
year.330: is the year that Constantine the Great dedicates the much-expanded and rebuilt city of Byzantium, changing its name to New Rome and declaring it the new capital of the Eastern Roman Empire.
year.1743: is the year that Maria Theresa of Austria is crowned Queen of Bohemia after defeating her rival, Charles VII, Holy Roman Emperor.
year.1588: is the year that French Wars of Religion: Henry III of France flees Paris after Henry I, Duke of Guise, enters the city and a spontaneous uprising occurs.
year.1551: is the year that National University of San Marcos, the oldest university in the Americas, is founded in Lima, Peru.
year.1510: is the year that The Prince of Anhua rebellion begins when Zhu Zhifan kills all the officials invited to a banquet and declares his intent on ousting the powerful Ming dynasty eunuch Liu Jin during the reign of the Zhengde Emperor.
year.1364: is the year that Jagiellonian University, the oldest university in Poland, is founded in Kraków.
year.1191: is the year that Richard I of England marries Berengaria of Navarre in Cyprus; she is crowned Queen consort of England the same day.
year.254: is the year that Pope Stephen I succeeds Pope Lucius I, becoming the 23rd pope of the Catholic Church, and immediately takes a stand against Novatianism.
year.1619: is the year that Dutch statesman Johan van Oldenbarnevelt is executed in The Hague after being convicted of treason.
year.1501: is the year that Amerigo Vespucci, this time under Portuguese flag, set sail for western lands.
year.1465: is the year that During the 1465 Moroccan revolution which overthrows the Marinid dynasty, the Jewish mellah is attacked by the population of Fez, though the extent of the massacre is debated.
year.1097: is the year that The Siege of Nicaea begins during the First Crusade.
year.1618: is the year that Johannes Kepler confirms his previously rejected discovery of the third law of planetary motion (he first discovered it on March 8 but soon rejected the idea after some initial calculations were made).
year.1252: is the year that Pope Innocent IV issues the papal bull ad extirpanda, which authorizes, but also limits, the torture of heretics in the Medieval Inquisition.
year.392: is the year that Emperor Valentinian II is assassinated while advancing into Gaul against the Frankish usurper Arbogast. He is found hanging in his residence at Vienne.
year.221: is the year that Liu Bei, Chinese warlord, proclaims himself emperor of Shu Han, the successor of the Han dynasty.
year.1532: is the year that Sir Thomas More resigns as Lord Chancellor of England.
year.1426: is the year that Gov. Thado of Mohnyin becomes King of Ava.
year.872: is the year that Louis II of Italy is crowned for the second time as Holy Roman Emperor at Rome, at the age of 47. His first coronation was 28 years earlier, in 844, during the reign of his father Lothair I.
year.332: is the year that Emperor Constantine the Great announces free distributions of food to the citizens in Constantinople.
year.1643: is the year that Thirty Years' War: French forces under the duc d'Enghien decisively defeat Spanish forces at the Battle of Rocroi, marking the symbolic end of Spain as a dominant land power.
year.1445: is the year that John II of Castile defeats the Infantes of Aragon at the First Battle of Olmedo.
year.1051: is the year that Henry I of France marries the Rus' princess, Anne of Kiev.
year.934: is the year that The Byzantine Empire reconquers Melitene under the leadership of John Kourkouas.
year.715: is the year that Pope Gregory II is elected.
year.639: is the year that Ashina Jiesheshuai and his tribesmen assaulted Emperor Taizong at Jiucheng Palace.
year.1293: is the year that King Sancho IV of Castile creates the Estudio de Escuelas de Generales in Alcalá de Henares.
year.1217: is the year that The Second Battle of Lincoln is fought near Lincoln, England, resulting in the defeat of Prince Louis of France by William Marshal, 1st Earl of Pembroke.
year.794: is the year that While visiting the royal Mercian court at Sutton Walls with a view to marrying princess Ælfthryth, King Æthelberht II of East Anglia is taken captive and beheaded.
year.685: is the year that The Battle of Dun Nechtain is fought between a Pictish army under King Bridei III and the invading Northumbrians under King Ecgfrith, who are decisively defeated.
year.325: is the year that The First Council of Nicaea is formally opened, starting the first ecumenical council of the Christian Church.
year.1403: is the year that Henry III of Castile sends Ruy González de Clavijo as ambassador to Timur to discuss the possibility of an alliance between Timur and Castile against the Ottoman Empire.
year.996: is the year that Sixteen-year-old Otto III is crowned Holy Roman Emperor.
year.879: is the year that Pope John VIII gives blessings to Branimir of Croatia and to the Croatian people, considered to be international recognition of the Croatian state.
year.878: is the year that Syracuse, Sicily, is captured by the Muslim Aghlabids after a nine-month siege.
year.1254: is the year that Serbian King Stefan Uroš I and the Republic of Venice sign a peace treaty.
year.1246: is the year that Henry Raspe is elected anti-king of the Kingdom of Germany in opposition to Conrad IV.
year.1200: is the year that King John of England and King Philip II of France sign the Treaty of Le Goulet.
year.1176: is the year that The Hashshashin (Assassins) attempt to assassinate Saladin near Aleppo.
year.853: is the year that A Byzantine fleet sacks and destroys undefended Damietta in Egypt.
year.760: is the year that Fourteenth recorded perihelion passage of Halley's Comet.
year.192: is the year that Dong Zhuo is assassinated by his adopted son Lü Bu.
year.1683: is the year that The Ashmolean Museum in Oxford, England, opens as the world's first university museum.
year.1276: is the year that Magnus Ladulås is crowned King of Sweden in Uppsala Cathedral.
year.1218: is the year that The Fifth Crusade leaves Acre for Egypt.
year.1420: is the year that Henry the Navigator is appointed governor of the Order of Christ.
year.1085: is the year that Alfonso VI of Castile takes Toledo, Spain, back from the Moors.
year.-240: is the year that First recorded perihelion passage of Halley's Comet.
year.-567: is the year that Servius Tullius, the king of Rome, celebrates a triumph for his victory over the Etruscans.
year.1135: is the year that Alfonso VII of León and Castile is crowned in León Cathedral as Imperator totius Hispaniae (Emperor of all of Spain).
year.961: is the year that King Otto I elects his six-year-old son Otto II as heir apparent and co-ruler of the East Frankish Kingdom. He is crowned at Aachen, and placed under the tutelage of his grandmother Matilda.
year.866: is the year that Basil I is crowned as co-emperor of the Byzantine Empire by Michael III.
year.17: is the year that Germanicus celebrates a triumph in Rome for his victories over the Cherusci, Chatti, and other German tribes west of the Elbe.
year.1257: is the year that Richard of Cornwall, and his wife, Sanchia of Provence, are crowned King and Queen of the Germans at Aachen Cathedral.
year.1153: is the year that Malcolm IV becomes King of Scotland.
year.621: is the year that Battle of Hulao: Li Shimin, the son of the Chinese emperor Gaozu, defeats the numerically superior forces of Dou Jiande near the Hulao Pass (Henan). This victory decides the outcome of the civil war that followed the Sui dynasty's collapse in favour of the Tang dynasty.
year.-585: is the year that A solar eclipse occurs, as predicted by the Greek philosopher and scientist Thales, while Alyattes is battling Cyaxares in the Battle of the Eclipse, leading to a truce. This is one of the cardinal dates from which other dates can be calculated. It is also the earliest event of which the precise date is known.
year.1416: is the year that Battle of Gallipoli: The Venetians under Pietro Loredan defeat a much larger Ottoman fleet off Gallipoli.
year.1233: is the year that Mongol–Jin war: The Mongols entered Kaifeng after a successful siege and began looting in the fallen capital of the Jin dynasty.
year.1167: is the year that Battle of Monte Porzio: A Roman army supporting Pope Alexander III is defeated by Christian of Buch and Rainald of Dassel.
year.1108: is the year that Battle of Uclés: Almoravid troops under the command of Tamim ibn Yusuf defeat a Castile and León alliance under the command of Prince Sancho Alfónsez.
year.1723: is the year that Johann Sebastian Bach assumed the office of Thomaskantor in Leipzig, presenting his first new cantata, Die Elenden sollen essen, BWV 75, in the St. Nicholas Church on the first Sunday after Trinity.
year.1574: is the year that Henry III becomes King of France.
year.1434: is the year that Hussite Wars: Battle of Lipany: Effectively ending the war, Utraquist forces led by Diviš Bořek of Miletínek defeat and almost annihilate Taborite forces led by Prokop the Great.
year.1381: is the year that Beginning of the Peasants' Revolt in England.
year.70: is the year that Siege of Jerusalem: Titus and his Roman legions breach the Second Wall of Jerusalem. Jewish defenders retreat to the First Wall. The Romans build a circumvallation, cutting down all trees within fifteen kilometres (9.3 mi).
year.1223: is the year that Mongol invasion of the Cumans: Battle of the Kalka River: Mongol armies of Genghis Khan led by Subutai defeat Kievan Rus' and Cumans.
year.1298: is the year that Residents of Riga and the Grand Duchy of Lithuania defeat the Livonian Order in the Battle of Turaida.
year.260: is the year that Sima Zhao's regicide of Cao Mao: The figurehead Wei emperor Cao Mao personally leads an attempt to oust his regent, Sima Zhao; the attempted coup is crushed and the emperor killed.
year.1665: is the year that James Stuart, Duke of York (later to become King James II of England), defeats the Dutch fleet off the coast of Lowestoft.
year.1326: is the year that The Treaty of Novgorod delineates borders between Russia and Norway in Finnmark.
year.1140: is the year that The French scholar Peter Abelard is found guilty of heresy.
year.713: is the year that The Byzantine emperor Philippicus is blinded, deposed and sent into exile by conspirators of the Opsikion army in Thrace. He is succeeded by Anastasios II, who begins the reorganization of the Byzantine army.
year.1086: is the year that Tutush, brother of Seljuk sultan Malik Shah, defeats Suleiman ibn Qutalmish, the Turkish ruler of Anatolia in the battle of Ain Salm.
year.830: is the year that Theodora is crowned Byzantine empress and marries then emperor Theophilos in the Hagia Sophia. She is credited with restoring Christian orthodoxy and icons.
year.1505: is the year that The M8.2–8.8 Lo Mustang earthquake affects Tibet and Nepal, causing severe damage in Kathmandu and parts of the Indo-Gangetic plain.
year.913: is the year that Constantine VII, the eight-year-old illegitimate son of Leo VI the Wise, becomes nominal ruler of the Byzantine Empire under the regency of a seven-man council headed by Patriarch Nicholas Mystikos, appointed by Constantine's uncle Alexander on his deathbed.
year.1099: is the year that First Crusade: The Siege of Jerusalem begins.
year.1042: is the year that Edward the Confessor becomes King of England – the country's penultimate Anglo-Saxon king.
year.793: is the year that Vikings raid the abbey at Lindisfarne in Northumbria, commonly accepted as the beginning of Norse activity in the British Isles.
year.452: is the year that Attila leads a Hun army in the invasion of Italy, devastating the northern provinces as he heads for Rome.
year.218: is the year that Battle of Antioch: With the support of the Syrian legions, Elagabalus defeats the forces of emperor Macrinus.
year.1732: is the year that James Oglethorpe is granted a royal charter for the colony of the future U.S. state of Georgia.
year.747: is the year that Abbasid Revolution: Abu Muslim Khorasani begins an open revolt against Umayyad rule, which is carried out under the sign of the Black Standard.
year.721: is the year that Odo of Aquitaine defeats the Moors in the Battle of Toulouse.
year.68: is the year that Nero dies by suicide after quoting Vergil's Aeneid, thus ending the Julio-Claudian dynasty and starting the civil war known as the Year of the Four Emperors.
year.53: is the year that The Roman emperor Nero marries Claudia Octavia.
year.-411: is the year that The Athenian coup succeeds, forming a short-lived oligarchy.
year.1596: is the year that Willem Barents and Jacob van Heemskerk discover Bear Island.
year.1358: is the year that Battle of Mello: The peasant forces of the Jacquerie are crushed by the army of the French nobility.
year.1225: is the year that Pope Honorius III issues the bull Vineae Domini custodes in which he approves the mission of Dominican friars to Morocco.
year.671: is the year that Emperor Tenji of Japan introduces a water clock (clepsydra) called Rokoku. The instrument, which measures time and indicates hours, is placed in the capital of Ōtsu.
year.1748: is the year that Denmark adopts the characteristic Nordic Cross flag later taken up by all other Scandinavian countries.
year.1345: is the year that The megas doux Alexios Apokaukos, chief minister of the Byzantine Empire, is lynched by political prisoners.
year.1157: is the year that Albert I of Brandenburg, also called The Bear (Ger: Albrecht der Bär), becomes the founder of the Margraviate of Brandenburg, Germany and the first margrave.
year.1118: is the year that Roger of Salerno, Prince of Antioch, captures Azaz from the Seljuk Turks.
year.1011: is the year that Lombard Revolt: Greek citizens of Bari rise up against the Lombard rebels led by Melus and deliver the city to Basil Mesardonites, Byzantine governor (catepan) of the Catepanate of Italy.
year.980: is the year that Vladimir the Great consolidates the Kievan realm from Ukraine to the Baltic Sea. He is proclaimed ruler (knyaz) of all Kievan Rus'.
year.786: is the year that A Hasanid Alid uprising in Mecca is crushed by the Abbasids at the Battle of Fakhkh.
year.631: is the year that Emperor Taizong of Tang sends envoys to the Xueyantuo bearing gold and silk in order to seek the release of Chinese prisoners captured during the transition from Sui to Tang.
year.173: is the year that Marcomannic Wars: The Roman army in Moravia is encircled by the Quadi, who have broken the peace treaty (171). In a violent thunderstorm emperor Marcus Aurelius defeats and subdues them in the so-called "miracle of the rain".
year.1550: is the year that The city of Helsinki, Finland (belonging to Sweden at the time) is founded by King Gustav I of Sweden.
year.1418: is the year that Armagnac–Burgundian Civil War: Parisians slaughter sympathizers of Bernard VII, Count of Armagnac, along with all prisoners, foreign bankers, and students and faculty of the College of Navarre.
year.1240: is the year that At the instigation of Louis IX of France, an inter-faith debate, known as the Disputation of Paris, starts between a Christian monk and four rabbis.
year.910: is the year that Battle of Augsburg: The Hungarians defeat the East Frankish army under King Louis the Child, using the famous feigned retreat tactic of the nomadic warriors.
year.1740: is the year that Georgia provincial governor James Oglethorpe begins an unsuccessful attempt to take Spanish Florida during the Siege of St. Augustine.
year.1514: is the year that Henry Grace à Dieu, at over 1,000 tons the largest warship in the world at this time, built at the new Woolwich Dockyard in England, is dedicated.
year.313: is the year that The decisions of the Edict of Milan, signed by Constantine the Great and co-emperor Valerius Licinius, granting religious freedom throughout the Roman Empire, are published in Nicomedia.
year.1216: is the year that First Barons' War: Prince Louis of France takes the city of Winchester, abandoned by John, King of England, and soon conquers over half of the kingdom.
year.1310: is the year that The Tiepolo conspiracy, seeking to seize power in the Republic of Venice, is thwarted after bloody street clashes in Venice. The suppression of the revolt will lead to the creation of the Council of Ten.
year.1219: is the year that Northern Crusades: Danish victory at the Battle of Lindanise (modern-day Tallinn) establishes the Danish Duchy of Estonia.
year.1184: is the year that The naval Battle of Fimreite is won by the Birkebeiner pretender Sverre Sigurdsson. Sigurdsson takes the Norwegian throne and King Magnus V of Norway is killed.
year.923: is the year that Battle of Soissons: King Robert I of France is killed and King Charles the Simple is arrested by the supporters of Duke Rudolph of Burgundy.
year.844: is the year that Louis II is crowned as king of Italy at Rome by pope Sergius II.
year.-763: is the year that Assyrians record a solar eclipse that is later used to fix the chronology of Mesopotamian history.
year.632: is the year that Yazdegerd III ascends the throne as king (shah) of the Persian Empire. He becomes the last ruler of the Sasanian dynasty (modern Iran).
year.1397: is the year that The Kalmar Union is formed under the rule of Margaret I of Denmark.
year.1300: is the year that Turku Cathedral is consecrated by Bishop Magnus I in the city of Turku (Swedish: Åbo).
year.653: is the year that Pope Martin I is arrested and taken to Constantinople, due to his opposition to monothelitism.
year.1684: is the year that The charter of the Massachusetts Bay Colony is revoked via a scire facias writ issued by an English court.
year.1053: is the year that Battle of Civitate: Three thousand Norman horsemen of Count Humphrey rout the troops of Pope Leo IX.
year.860: is the year that Byzantine–Rus' War: A fleet of about 200 Rus' vessels sails into the Bosphorus and starts pillaging the suburbs of the Byzantine capital Constantinople.
year.656: is the year that Ali becomes Caliph of the Rashidun Caliphate.
year.618: is the year that Li Yuan becomes Emperor Gaozu of Tang, initiating three centuries of Tang dynasty rule over China.
year.1179: is the year that The Battle of Kalvskinnet takes place outside Nidaros (now Trondheim), Norway. Earl Erling Skakke is killed, and the battle changes the tide of the civil wars.
year.1295: is the year that The Treaty of Anagni, an attempt mediated by the papacy to end the War of the Sicilian Vespers, is signed by the crown of Aragon, the kingdom of France and kingdom of Naples.
year.1734: is the year that In Montreal, New France, a  slave known by the French name of Marie-Joseph Angélique is put to death, having been convicted of setting the fire that destroyed much of the city.
year.1307: is the year that Külüg Khan is enthroned as Khagan of the Mongols and Wuzong of the Yuan.
year.813: is the year that Battle of Versinikia: The Bulgars led by Krum defeat the Byzantine army near Edirne. Emperor Michael I is forced to abdicate in favor of Leo V the Armenian.
year.431: is the year that The Council of Ephesus, the third ecumenical council, begins, dealing with Nestorianism.
year.-168: is the year that Battle of Pydna: Romans under Lucius Aemilius Paullus defeat Macedonian King Perseus who surrenders after the battle, ending the Third Macedonian War.
year.-217: is the year that Battle of Raphia: Ptolemy IV Philopator of Egypt defeats Antiochus III the Great of the Seleucid kingdom.
year.1305: is the year that A peace treaty between the Flemish and the French is signed at Athis-sur-Orge.
year.1280: is the year that The Spanish Reconquista: In the Battle of Moclín the Emirate of Granada ambush a superior pursuing force, killing most of them in a military disaster for the Kingdom of Castile.
year.229: is the year that Sun Quan proclaims himself emperor of Eastern Wu.
year.1374: is the year that A sudden outbreak of St. John's Dance causes people in the streets of Aachen, Germany, to experience hallucinations and begin to jump and twitch uncontrollably until they collapse from exhaustion.
year.1340: is the year that Hundred Years' War: Battle of Sluys: The French fleet is almost completely destroyed by the English fleet commanded personally by King Edward III.
year.1128: is the year that Battle of São Mamede, near Guimarães: Forces led by Afonso I defeat forces led by his mother Teresa of León and her lover Fernando Pérez de Traba.
year.637: is the year that The Battle of Moira is fought between the High King of Ireland and the Kings of Ulster and Dál Riata. It is claimed to be the largest battle in the history of Ireland.
year.109: is the year that Roman emperor Trajan inaugurates the Aqua Traiana, an aqueduct that channels water from Lake Bracciano, 40 kilometres (25 miles) northwest of Rome.
year.-1312: is the year that Mursili II launches a campaign against the Kingdom of Azzi-Hayasa.
year.1678: is the year that Venetian Elena Cornaro Piscopia is the first woman awarded a doctorate of philosophy when she graduates from the University of Padua.
year.841: is the year that In the Battle of Fontenay-en-Puisaye, forces led by Charles the Bald and Louis the German defeat the armies of Lothair I of Italy and Pepin II of Aquitaine.
year.524: is the year that The Franks are defeated by the Burgundians in the Battle of Vézeronce.
year.1522: is the year that Ottomans begin the second Siege of Rhodes.
year.1460: is the year that War of the Roses: Richard Neville, 16th Earl of Warwick, and Edward, Earl of March, land in England with a rebel army and march on London.
year.1243: is the year that Mongols defeat the Seljuk Turks at the Battle of Köse Dağ.
year.699: is the year that En no Ozuno, a Japanese mystic and apothecary who will later be regarded as the founder of a folk religion Shugendō, is banished to Izu Ōshima.
year.684: is the year that Pope Benedict II is the last pope to require confirmation by the Byzantine emperor before taking office.
year.4: is the year that Augustus adopts Tiberius.
year.1620: is the year that English crown bans tobacco growing in England, giving the Virginia Company a monopoly in exchange for tax of one shilling per pound.
year.1457: is the year that The Dutch city of Dordrecht is devastated by fire
year.1170: is the year that A major earthquake hits Syria, badly damaging towns such as Hama and Shaizar and structures such as the Krak des Chevaliers and the cathedral of St. Peter in Antioch.
year.1149: is the year that Raymond of Poitiers is defeated and killed at the Battle of Inab by Nur ad-Din Zangi.
year.226: is the year that Cao Rui succeeds his father as emperor of Wei.
year.1422: is the year that Battle of Arbedo between the duke of Milan and the Swiss cantons.
year.1398: is the year that Zhu Yunwen ascended the throne to the Ming dynasty to become the Jianwen Emperor.
year.296: is the year that Pope Marcellinus begins his papacy.
year.552: is the year that Battle of Taginae: Byzantine forces under Narses defeat the Ostrogoths in Italy, and the Ostrogoth king, Totila, is mortally wounded.
year.626: is the year that Li Shimin, the future Emperor Taizong of Tang, ambushes and kills his rival brothers Li Yuanji and Li Jiancheng in the Xuanwu Gate Incident.
year.1035: is the year that William the Conqueror becomes the Duke of Normandy, reigning until 1087.
year.324: is the year that Battle of Adrianople: Constantine I defeats Licinius, who flees to Byzantium.
year.1827: is the year that Slavery is abolished in the State of New York.
year.1634: is the year that The city of Trois-Rivières is founded in New France (now Quebec, Canada).
year.1456: is the year that Ottoman–Hungarian wars: The Siege of Nándorfehérvár (Belgrade) begins.
year.1359: is the year that Francesco II Ordelaffi of Forlì surrenders to the Papal commander Gil de Albornoz.
year.1333: is the year that Genkō War: Forces loyal to Emperor Go-Daigo seize Tōshō-ji during the Siege of Kamakura. Hōjō Takatoki and other members of the Hōjō clan commit suicide, ending the rule of the Kamakura shogunate.
year.1187: is the year that The Crusades: Battle of Hattin: Saladin defeats Guy of Lusignan, King of Jerusalem.
year.1054: is the year that A supernova, called SN 1054, is seen by Chinese Song dynasty, Arab, and possibly Amerindian observers near the star Zeta Tauri. For several months it remains bright enough to be seen during the day. Its remnants form the Crab Nebula.
year.993: is the year that Ulrich of Augsburg is canonized as a saint.
year.836: is the year that Pactum Sicardi, a peace treaty between the Principality of Benevento and the Duchy of Naples, is signed.
year.414: is the year that Emperor Theodosius II, age 13, yields power to his older sister Aelia Pulcheria, who reigned as regent and proclaimed herself empress (Augusta) of the Eastern Roman Empire.
year.-362: is the year that Battle of Mantinea: The Thebans, led by Epaminondas, defeated the Spartans.
year.1751: is the year that Pope Benedict XIV suppresses the Patriarchate of Aquileia and establishes from its territory the Archdiocese of Udine and Gorizia.
year.1557: is the year that King Philip II of Spain, consort of Queen Mary I of England, sets out from Dover to war with France, which eventually resulted in the loss of the city of Calais, the last English possession on the continent, and Mary I never seeing her husband again.
year.640: is the year that Battle of Heliopolis: The Muslim Arab army under 'Amr ibn al-'As defeat the Byzantine forces near Heliopolis (Egypt).
year.-371: is the year that The Battle of Leuctra shatters Sparta's reputation of military invincibility.
year.1124: is the year that The city of Tyre falls to the Venetian Crusade after a siege of nineteen weeks.
year.1283: is the year that Roger of Lauria, commanding the Aragonese fleet, defeats an Angevin fleet sent to put down a rebellion on Malta.
year.1357: is the year that Emperor Charles IV assists in laying the foundation stone of Charles Bridge in Prague.
year.969: is the year that The Fatimid general Jawhar leads the Friday prayer in Fustat in the name of Caliph al-Mu'izz li-Din Allah, thereby symbolically completing the Fatimid conquest of Egypt.
year.869: is the year that The 8.4–9.0 Mw Sanriku earthquake strikes the area around Sendai in northern Honshu, Japan. Inundation from the tsunami extended several kilometers inland.
year.660: is the year that Korean forces under general Kim Yu-sin of Silla defeat the army of Baekje in the Battle of Hwangsanbeol.
year.551: is the year that A major earthquake strikes Beirut, triggering a devastating tsunami that affects the coastal towns of Byzantine Phoenicia, causing thousands of deaths.
year.381: is the year that The end of the First Council of Christian bishops convened in Constantinople by the Roman emperor Theodosius I.
year.118: is the year that Hadrian, who became emperor a year previously on Trajan's death, makes his entry into Rome.
year.1212: is the year that The most severe of several early fires of London burns most of the city to the ground.
year.988: is the year that The Norse King Glúniairn recognises Máel Sechnaill mac Domnaill, High King of Ireland, and agrees to pay taxes and accept Brehon Law; the event is considered to be the founding of the city of Dublin.
year.645: is the year that Isshi Incident: Prince Naka-no-Ōe and Fujiwara no Kamatari assassinate Soga no Iruka during a coup d'état at the imperial palace.
year.420: is the year that Having usurped the throne of Emperor Gong of Jin, Liu Yu proclaims himself Emperor of the Liu Song dynasty.
year.1405: is the year that Ming admiral Zheng He sets sail to explore the world for the first time.
year.911: is the year that Signing of the Treaty of Saint-Clair-sur-Epte between Charles the Simple and Rollo of Normandy.
year.1691: is the year that Battle of Aughrim (Julian calendar): The decisive victory of William III of England's forces in Ireland.
year.1543: is the year that King Henry VIII of England marries his sixth and last wife, Catherine Parr, at Hampton Court Palace.
year.1470: is the year that The Ottomans capture Euboea.
year.1335: is the year that Pope Benedict XII issues the papal bull Fulgens sicut stella matutina to reform the Cistercian Order.
year.927: is the year that King Constantine II of Scotland, King Hywel Dda of Deheubarth, Ealdred of Bamburgh and King Owain of the Cumbrians accepted the overlordship of King Æthelstan of England, leading to seven years of peace in the north.
year.1402: is the year that Nanjing surrenders to Zhu Di without a fight, ending the Jingnan campaign. The Jianwen Emperor disappears and his family is incarcerated.
year.1769: is the year that An expedition led by Gaspar de Portolá leaves its base in San Diego and sets out to find the Port of Monterey (now Monterey, California).
year.982: is the year that King Otto II and his Frankish army are defeated by the Muslim army of al-Qasim at Cape Colonna, Southern Italy.
year.1482: is the year that Muhammad XII is crowned the twenty-second and last Nasrid king of Granada.
year.-484: is the year that Dedication of the Temple of Castor and Pollux in ancient Rome.
year.1251: is the year that Celebrated by the Carmelite Order–but doubted by modern historians–as the day when Saint Simon Stock had a vision of the Virgin Mary.
year.1228: is the year that Saint Francis of Assisi was canonized.
year.997: is the year that Battle of Spercheios: Bulgarian forces of Tsar Samuel are defeated by a Byzantine army under general Nikephoros Ouranos at the Spercheios River in Greece.
year.622: is the year that The Hijrah of Muhammad begins, marking the beginning of the Islamic calendar.
year.1489: is the year that Sikandar Lodi succeeds Bahlul Khan Lodi as Sultan of Delhi.
year.1203: is the year that The Fourth Crusade assaults Constantinople. The Byzantine emperor Alexios III Angelos flees from his capital into exile.
year.1048: is the year that Damasus II is elected pope, and dies 23 days later.
year.1507: is the year that In Brussels, Prince Charles I is crowned Duke of Burgundy and Count of Flanders, a year after inheriting the title.
year.1389: is the year that France and England agree to the Truce of Leulinghem, inaugurating a 13-year peace, the longest period of sustained peace during the Hundred Years' War.
year.1334: is the year that The bishop of Florence blesses the first foundation stone for the new campanile (bell tower) of the Florence Cathedral, designed by the artist Giotto di Bondone.
year.1195: is the year that Battle of Alarcos: Almohad forces defeat the Castilian army of Alfonso VIII and force its retreat to Toledo.
year.362: is the year that Roman–Persian Wars: Emperor Julian arrives at Antioch with a Roman expeditionary force (60,000 men) and stays there for nine months to launch a campaign against the Persian Empire.
year.-477: is the year that Battle of the Cremera as part of the Roman–Etruscan Wars.  Veii ambushes and defeats the Roman army.
year.998: is the year that Arab–Byzantine wars: Battle of Apamea: Fatimids defeat a Byzantine army near Apamea.
year.939: is the year that Battle of Simancas: King Ramiro II of León defeats the Moorish army under Caliph Abd-al-Rahman III near the city of Simancas.
year.64: is the year that The Great Fire of Rome causes widespread devastation and rages on for six days, destroying half of the city.
year.1592: is the year that During the first Japanese invasion of Korea, Japanese forces led by Toyotomi Hideyoshi captured Pyongyang, although they were ultimately unable to hold it.
year.1189: is the year that Richard I of England officially invested as Duke of Normandy.
year.792: is the year that Kardam of Bulgaria defeats Byzantine Emperor Constantine VI at the Battle of Marcellae.
year.905: is the year that King Berengar I of Italy and a hired Hungarian army defeats the Frankish forces at Verona. King Louis III is captured and blinded for breaking his oath (see 902).
year.365: is the year that The 365 Crete earthquake affected the Greek island of Crete with a maximum Mercalli intensity of XI (Extreme), causing a destructive tsunami that affects the coasts of Libya and Egypt, especially Alexandria. Many thousands are killed.
year.285: is the year that Diocletian appoints Maximian as Caesar and co-ruler.
year.230: is the year that Pope Pontian succeeds Urban I as the eighteenth pope. After being exiled to Sardinia, he became the first pope to resign his office.
year.-356: is the year that The Temple of Artemis in Ephesus, one of the Seven Wonders of the World, is destroyed by arson.
year.1686: is the year that Albany, New York is formally chartered as a municipality by Governor Thomas Dongan.
year.1443: is the year that Battle of St. Jakob an der Sihl in the Old Zürich War.
year.1209: is the year that Massacre at Béziers: The first major military action of the Albigensian Crusade.
year.838: is the year that Battle of Anzen: The Byzantine emperor Theophilos suffers a heavy defeat by the Abbasids.
year.1319: is the year that A Knights Hospitaller fleet scores a crushing victory over an Aydinid fleet off Chios.
year.811: is the year that Byzantine emperor Nikephoros I plunders the Bulgarian capital of Pliska and captures Khan Krum's treasury.
year.1304: is the year that Wars of Scottish Independence: Fall of Stirling Castle: King Edward I of England takes the stronghold using the War Wolf.
year.1148: is the year that Louis VII of France lays siege to Damascus during the Second Crusade.
year.1132: is the year that Battle of Nocera between Ranulf II of Alife and Roger II of Sicily.
year.1467: is the year that The Battle of Molinella: The first battle in Italy in which firearms are used extensively.
year.1278: is the year that The naval Battle of Algeciras takes place in the context of the Spanish Reconquista resulting in a victory for the Emirate of Granada and the Maranid Dynasty over the Kingdom of Castile.
year.1137: is the year that Eleanor of Aquitaine marries Prince Louis, later King Louis VII of France, at the Cathedral of Saint-André in Bordeaux.
year.918: is the year that Wang Geon becomes King of Goryeo after overthrowing Gung Ye in a coup the previous day
year.864: is the year that The Edict of Pistres of Charles the Bald orders defensive measures against the Vikings.
year.677: is the year that Climax of the Siege of Thessalonica by the Slavs in a three-day assault on the city walls.
year.315: is the year that The Arch of Constantine is completed near the Colosseum in Rome to commemorate Constantine I's victory over Maxentius at the Milvian Bridge.
year.306: is the year that Constantine I is proclaimed Roman emperor by his troops.
year.920: is the year that Rout of an alliance of Christian troops from Navarre and Léon against the Muslims at the Battle of Valdejunquera.
year.657: is the year that First Fitna: In the Battle of Siffin, troops led by Ali ibn Abu Talib clash with those led by Muawiyah I.
year.1299: is the year that According to Edward Gibbon, Osman I invades the territory of Nicomedia for the first time, usually considered to be the founding day of the Ottoman state.
year.1202: is the year that Georgian–Seljuk wars: At the Battle of Basian the Kingdom of Georgia defeats the Sultanate of Rum.
year.1030: is the year that Ladejarl-Fairhair succession wars: Battle of Stiklestad: King Olaf II fights and dies trying to regain his Norwegian throne from the Danes.
year.615: is the year that Pakal ascends the throne of Palenque at the age of 12.
year.-587: is the year that The Neo-Babylonian Empire sacks Jerusalem and destroys the First Temple.
year.1729: is the year that Founding of Baltimore, Maryland.
year.1627: is the year that An earthquake kills about 5,000 people in Gargano, Italy.
year.762: is the year that Baghdad is founded.
year.1201: is the year that Attempted usurpation by John Komnenos the Fat for the throne of Alexios III Angelos.
year.781: is the year that The oldest recorded eruption of Mount Fuji (Traditional Japanese date: Sixth day of the seventh month of the first year of the Ten'o (天応) era).
year.-30: is the year that Battle of Alexandria: Mark Antony achieves a minor victory over Octavian's forces, but most of his army subsequently deserts, leading to his suicide.
year.1469: is the year that Louis XI of France founds the chivalric order called the Order of Saint Michael in Amboise.
year.902: is the year that Taormina, the last Byzantine stronghold in Sicily, is captured by the Aghlabid army, concluding the Muslim conquest of Sicily.
year.932: is the year that After a two-year siege, the city of Toledo, in Spain, surrenders to the forces of the Caliph of Córdoba Abd al-Rahman III, assuming an important victory in his campaign to subjugate the Central March.
year.461: is the year that Majorian is arrested near Tortona (northern Italy) and deposed by the Suebian general Ricimer as puppet emperor.
year.-216: is the year that The Carthaginian army led by Hannibal defeats a numerically superior Roman army at the Battle of Cannae.
year.-338: is the year that A Macedonian army led by Philip II defeated the combined forces of Athens and Thebes in the Battle of Chaeronea, securing Macedonian hegemony in Greece and the Aegean.
year.1057: is the year that Frederick of Lorraine elected as Pope Stephen IX.
year.1031: is the year that Olaf II of Norway is canonized as Saint Olaf by Grimketel, the English Bishop of Selsey.
year.908: is the year that Battle of Eisenach: An invading Hungarian force defeats an East Frankish army under Duke Burchard of Thuringia.
year.881: is the year that Battle of Saucourt-en-Vimeu: Louis III of France defeats the Vikings, an event celebrated in the poem Ludwigslied.
year.435: is the year that Deposed Ecumenical Patriarch of Constantinople Nestorius, considered the originator of Nestorianism, is exiled by Roman Emperor Theodosius II to a monastery in Egypt.
year.8: is the year that Roman Empire general Tiberius defeats the Dalmatae on the river Bosna.
year.1100: is the year that Henry I is crowned King of England in Westminster Abbey.
year.642: is the year that Battle of Maserfield: Penda of Mercia defeats and kills Oswald of Northumbria.
year.25: is the year that Guangwu claims the throne as Emperor of China, restoring the Han dynasty after the collapse of the short-lived Xin dynasty.
year.936: is the year that Coronation of King Otto I of Germany.
year.768: is the year that Pope Stephen III is elected to office, and quickly seeks Frankish protection against the Lombard threat, since the Byzantine Empire is no longer able to help.
year.1220: is the year that Sweden is defeated by Estonian tribes in the Battle of Lihula.
year.-685: is the year that Spring and Autumn period: Battle of Qianshi: Upon the death of the previous Duke of Qi, Gongsun Wuzhi, Duke Zhuang of Lu sends an army into the Duchy of Qi to install the exiled Qi prince Gongzi Jiu as the new Duke of Qi – but is defeated at Qianshi by Jiu's brother and rival claimant, the newly inaugurated Duke Huan of Qi.
year.1173: is the year that Construction of the campanile of the Cathedral of Pisa (now known as the Leaning Tower of Pisa) begins; it will take two centuries to complete.
year.-48: is the year that Caesar's Civil War: Battle of Pharsalus: Julius Caesar decisively defeats Pompey at Pharsalus and Pompey flees to Egypt.
year.991: is the year that Battle of Maldon: The English, led by Byrhtnoth, Ealdorman of Essex, are defeated by a band of inland-raiding Vikings near Maldon, Essex.
year.955: is the year that Battle of Lechfeld: Otto I, Holy Roman Emperor defeats the Magyars, ending 50 years of Magyar invasion of the West.
year.654: is the year that Pope Eugene I elected to succeed Martinus I.
year.1473: is the year that The Battle of Otlukbeli: Mehmed the Conqueror of the Ottoman Empire decisively defeats Uzun Hassan of Aq Qoyunlu.
year.490: is the year that Battle of Adda: The Goths under Theodoric the Great and his ally Alaric II defeat the forces of Odoacer on the Adda River, near Milan.
year.355: is the year that Claudius Silvanus, accused of treason, proclaims himself Roman Emperor against Constantius II.
year.117: is the year that Hadrian is proclaimed Roman emperor, two days after Trajan's death.
year.-2492: is the year that Traditional date of the defeat of Bel by Hayk, progenitor and founder of the Armenian nation.
year.-3114: is the year that The Mesoamerican Long Count calendar, used by several pre-Columbian Mesoamerican civilizations, notably the Maya, begins.
year.1164: is the year that Battle of Harim: Nur ad-Din Zangi defeats the Crusader armies of the County of Tripoli and the Principality of Antioch.
year.1121: is the year that Battle of Didgori: The Georgian army under King David IV wins a decisive victory over the famous Seljuk commander Ilghazi.
year.582: is the year that Maurice becomes Emperor of the Byzantine Empire.
year.554: is the year that Emperor Justinian I rewards Liberius for his service in the Pragmatic Sanction, granting him extensive estates in Italy.
year.523: is the year that John I becomes the new Pope after the death of Pope Hormisdas.
year.-29: is the year that Octavian holds the first of three consecutive triumphs in Rome to celebrate the victory over the Dalmatian tribes.
year.1385: is the year that Portuguese Crisis of 1383–85: Battle of Aljubarrota: Portuguese forces commanded by John I of Portugal defeat the Castilian army of John I of Castile.
year.1183: is the year that Taira no Munemori and the Taira clan take the young Emperor Antoku and the three sacred treasures and flee to western Japan to escape pursuit by the Minamoto clan.
year.1040: is the year that King Duncan I is killed in battle against his first cousin and rival Macbeth. The latter succeeds him as King of Scotland.
year.-74: is the year that A group of officials, led by the Western Han minister Huo Guang, present articles of impeachment against the new emperor, Liu He, to the imperial regent, Empress Dowager Shangguan.
year.1599: is the year that Nine Years' War: Battle of Curlew Pass: Irish forces led by Hugh Roe O'Donnell successfully ambush English forces, led by Sir Conyers Clifford, sent to relieve Collooney Castle.
year.1281: is the year that Mongol invasion of Japan: The Mongolian fleet of Kublai Khan is destroyed by a "divine wind" for the second time in the Battle of Kōan.
year.1248: is the year that The foundation stone of Cologne Cathedral, built to house the relics of the Three Wise Men, is laid. (Construction is eventually completed in 1880.)
year.1237: is the year that Spanish Reconquista: The Battle of the Puig between the Moorish forces of Taifa of Valencia against the Crown of Aragon culminates in an Aragonese victory.
year.1224: is the year that The Livonian Brothers of the Sword, a Catholic military order, occupy Tarbatu (today Tartu) as part of the Livonian Crusade.
year.1070: is the year that The Pavian-born Benedictine Lanfranc is appointed as the new Archbishop of Canterbury in England.
year.805: is the year that Noble Erchana of Dahauua grants the Bavarian town of Dachau to the Diocese of Freising
year.778: is the year that The Battle of Roncevaux Pass takes place between the army of Charlemagne and a Basque army.
year.718: is the year that Arab–Byzantine wars: Raising of the Second Arab Siege of Constantinople.
year.636: is the year that Arab–Byzantine wars: The Battle of Yarmouk between the Byzantine Empire and the Rashidun Caliphate begins.
year.963: is the year that Nikephoros II Phokas is crowned emperor of the Byzantine Empire.
year.942: is the year that Start of the four-day Battle of al-Mada'in, between the Hamdanids of Mosul and the Baridis of Basra over control of the Abbasid capital, Baghdad.
year.-1: is the year that Wang Mang consolidates his power in China and is declared marshal of state. Emperor Ai of Han, who died the previous day, had no heirs.
year.1424: is the year that Hundred Years' War: Battle of Verneuil: An English force under John, Duke of Bedford defeats a larger French army under Jean II, Duke of Alençon, John Stewart, and Earl Archibald of Douglas.
year.707: is the year that Princess Abe accedes to the imperial Japanese throne as Empress Genmei.
year.1666: is the year that Second Anglo-Dutch War: Rear Admiral Robert Holmes leads a raid on the Dutch island of Terschelling, destroying 116 to 160 merchant ships, an act later known as "Holmes's Bonfire".
year.-295: is the year that The first temple to Venus, the Roman goddess of love, beauty and fertility, is dedicated by Quintus Fabius Maximus Gurges during the Third Samnite War.
year.1308: is the year that At the conclusion of the interrogation of the leaders of the Knights Templar, the three papal investigators, Cardinals Bérenger Frédol, Etienne de Suisy and Landolfo Brancacci, write the "Chinon Parchment", in which they affirm that the accused Templars had confessed, done penance, and were absolved of heresy.
year.1083: is the year that The first King of Hungary, Stephen I, and his son, Prince Emeric, are canonized, a date now celebrated as a National Day in Hungary.
year.917: is the year that Battle of Acheloos: Tsar Simeon I of Bulgaria decisively defeats a Byzantine army.
year.14: is the year that Agrippa Postumus, maternal grandson of the late Roman emperor Augustus, is executed by his guards while in exile.
year.959: is the year that Eraclus becomes the 25th bishop of Liège.
year.1382: is the year that The Golden Horde, led by Khan Tokhtamysh, begins the Siege of Moscow, which ends four days later with the storming of the city and the death of Muscovite Prince Ostei.
year.476: is the year that Odoacer, chieftain of the Germanic tribes (Herulic – Scirian foederati), is proclaimed rex Italiae ("King of Italy") by his troops.
year.79: is the year that Mount Vesuvius begins stirring, on the feast day of Vulcan, the Roman god of fire.
year.394: is the year that The Graffito of Esmet-Akhom, the latest known inscription in Egyptian hieroglyphs, is written.
year.367: is the year that Gratian, son of Roman Emperor Valentinian I, is named co-Augustus at the age of eight by his father.
year.766: is the year that Emperor Constantine V humiliates nineteen high-ranking officials, after discovering a plot against him. He executes the leaders, Constantine Podopagouros and his brother Strategios.
year.1366: is the year that The Byzantine Empire retakes Gallipoli with the help of the Savoyard Crusade.
year.683: is the year that The Battle of al-Harrah concludes, with Yazid I's army killing 11,000 people of the city of Medina.
year.1353: is the year that War of the Straits and Sardinian–Aragonese war: The Battle of Alghero results in a crushing victory of the allied Aragonese and Venetian fleet over the Genoese fleet, most of which is captured.
year.1172: is the year that Henry the Young King and Margaret of France are crowned junior king and queen of England.
year.663: is the year that Silla–Tang armies crush the Baekje restoration attempt and force Yamato Japan to withdraw from Korea in the Battle of Baekgang.
year.489: is the year that Theodoric, king of the Ostrogoths, defeats Odoacer at the Battle of Isonzo, forcing his way into Italy.
year.1728: is the year that The city of Nuuk in Greenland is founded as the fort of Godt-Haab by the royal governor Claus Paarss.
year.1350: is the year that Battle of Winchelsea (or Les Espagnols sur Mer): The English naval fleet under King Edward III defeats a Castilian fleet of 40 ships.
year.1464: is the year that Paul II succeeds Pius II as pope of the Catholic Church.
year.1363: is the year that The five-week Battle of Lake Poyang begins, in which the forces of two Chinese rebel leaders (Chen Youliang and Zhu Yuanzhang) meet to decide who will supplant the Yuan dynasty.
year.1060: is the year that The Mirdasids defeat the Fatimid Caliphate at the Battle of al-Funaydiq, signalling the definitive loss of Aleppo for the Fatimids.
year.1145: is the year that The main altar of Lund Cathedral, at the time the seat of the archiepiscopal see of all the Nordic countries, is consecrated.
year.-396: is the year that The Temple of Juno Regina (Aventine) is dedicated in Rome by Marcus Furius Camillus.
year.-31: is the year that Final War of the Roman Republic: Battle of Actium: Off the western coast of Greece, forces of Octavian defeat troops under Mark Antony and Cleopatra.
year.863: is the year that Major Byzantine victory at the Battle of Lalakaon against an Arab raid.
year.673: is the year that King Wamba of the Visigoths puts down a revolt by Hilderic, governor of Nîmes (France) and rival for the throne.
year.301: is the year that San Marino, one of the smallest nations in the world and the world's oldest republic still in existence, is founded by Saint Marinus.
year.-36: is the year that In the Battle of Naulochus, Marcus Vipsanius Agrippa, admiral of Octavian, defeats Sextus Pompey, son of Pompey, thus ending Pompeian resistance to the Second Triumvirate.
year.1698: is the year that In an effort to Westernize his nobility, Tsar Peter I of Russia imposes a tax on beards for all men except the clergy and peasantry.
year.1367: is the year that Swa Saw Ke becomes king of Ava
year.1159: is the year that Cardinal Rolando Bandinelli is elected Pope Alexander III, prompting the election of Cardinal Octaviano Monticelli as Antipope Victor IV the same day.
year.1089: is the year that The first synod of pope Urban II starts in Melfi, with seventy bishops and twelve abbots in attendance. The synod issues several decrees about church law and deals with the relation with the Greek part of the Church.
year.1390: is the year that Lithuanian Civil War (1389–1392): The Teutonic Knights begin a five-week siege of Vilnius.
year.1213: is the year that Albigensian Crusade: Simon de Montfort, 5th Earl of Leicester, defeats Peter II of Aragon at the Battle of Muret.
year.372: is the year that Sixteen Kingdoms: Sima Yao, age 10, succeeds his father Emperor Jianwen as Emperor Xiaowu of the Eastern Jin dynasty.
year.-490: is the year that Battle of Marathon: The conventionally accepted date for the Battle of Marathon. The Athenians and their Plataean allies defeat the first Persian invasion force of Greece.
year.1437: is the year that Battle of Tangier: a Portuguese expeditionary force initiates a failed attempt to seize the Moroccan citadel of Tangier.
year.1115: is the year that Roger of Salerno's Crusader army defeats a numerically superior Seljuk army in the battle of Sarmin
year.81: is the year that Domitian became Emperor of the Roman Empire upon the death of his brother Titus.
year.994: is the year that Major Fatimid victory over the Byzantine Empire at the Battle of the Orontes.
year.1577: is the year that The Treaty of Bergerac is signed between King Henry III of France and the Huguenots.
year.96: is the year that Emperor Domitian is assassinated as a result of a plot by his wife Domitia and two Praetorian prefects. Nerva is then proclaimed as his successor.
year.634: is the year that Siege of Damascus: The Rashidun Arabs under Khalid ibn al-Walid capture Damascus from the Byzantine Empire.
year.1737: is the year that The Walking Purchase concludes, which forces the cession of 1.2 million acres (4,900 km2) of Lenape-Delaware tribal land to the Pennsylvania Colony.
year.1378: is the year that Cardinal Robert of Geneva is elected as Pope Clement VII, beginning the Papal schism.
year.1058: is the year that Agnes of Poitou and Andrew I of Hungary meet to negotiate about the border territory of Burgenland.
year.1459: is the year that The Battle of Blore Heath, the first major battle of the English Wars of the Roses, is won by the Yorkists.
year.1338: is the year that The Battle of Arnemuiden, in which a French force defeats the English, is the first naval battle of the Hundred Years' War and the first naval battle in which gunpowder artillery is used.
year.1122: is the year that Pope Callixtus II and Holy Roman Emperor Henry V agree to the Concordat of Worms to put an end to the Investiture Controversy.
year.38: is the year that Drusilla, Caligula's sister who died in June, with whom the emperor is said to have an incestuous relationship, is deified.
year.787: is the year that The Second Council of Nicaea begins at the Church of Holy Wisdom in the city of Nicaea in Bithynia.
year.1396: is the year that Ottoman Emperor Bayezid I defeats a Christian army at the Battle of Nicopolis.
year.275: is the year that For the last time, the Roman Senate chooses an emperor; they elect 75-year-old Marcus Claudius Tacitus.
year.1142: is the year that Stephen of Blois's army approached Oxford, beginning the siege of Oxford.
year.1087: is the year that William II is crowned King of England, and reigns until 1100.
year.1106: is the year that King Henry I of England defeats his brother Robert Curthose at the Battle of Tinchebray.
year.995: is the year that Boleslaus II, Duke of Bohemia, kills most members of the rival Slavník dynasty.
year.935: is the year that Duke Wenceslaus I of Bohemia is murdered by a group of nobles led by his brother Boleslaus I, who succeeds him.
year.1267: is the year that The Treaty of Montgomery recognises Llywelyn ap Gruffudd as Prince of Wales, but only as a vassal of King Henry III.
year.-61: is the year that Pompey the Great celebrates his third triumph for victories over the pirates and the end of the Mithridatic Wars on his 45th birthday.
year.1399: is the year that Henry IV is proclaimed king of England.
year.737: is the year that The Turgesh drive back an Umayyad invasion of Khuttal, follow them south of the Oxus, and capture their baggage train.
year.965: is the year that Pope John XIII is consecrated.
year.-331: is the year that Alexander the Great defeats Darius III of Persia in the Battle of Gaugamela.
year.1263: is the year that The Battle of Largs is fought between Norwegians and Scots.
year.829: is the year that Theophilos succeeds his father Michael II as Byzantine Emperor.
year.382: is the year that Roman Emperor Theodosius I concludes a peace treaty with the Goths and settles them in the Balkans.
year.-52: is the year that Gallic Wars: Vercingetorix, leader of the Gauls, surrenders to the Romans under Julius Caesar, ending the siege and battle of Alesia.
year.-2457: is the year that Gaecheonjeol, Hwanung (환웅) purportedly descended from heaven. South Korea's National Foundation Day.
year.23: is the year that Rebels sack the Chinese capital Chang'an during a peasant rebellion.
year.1143: is the year that With the signing of the Treaty of Zamora, King Alfonso VII of León and Castile recognises Portugal as a Kingdom.
year.816: is the year that King Louis the Pious is crowned emperor of the Holy Roman Empire by the Pope.
year.610: is the year that Heraclius arrives at Constantinople, kills Byzantine Emperor Phocas, and becomes emperor.
year.-69: is the year that Third Mithridatic War: The military of the Roman Republic subdues Armenia.
year.-105: is the year that Cimbrian War: Defeat at the Battle of Arausio of the Roman army of the mid-Republic
year.-3761: is the year that The epoch reference date (start) of the modern Hebrew calendar.
year.1480: is the year that The Great Stand on the Ugra River puts an end to Tatar rule over Moscow
year.1075: is the year that Dmitar Zvonimir is crowned King of Croatia.
year.316: is the year that Constantine I defeats Licinius, who loses his European territories.
year.732: is the year that Charles Martel's forces defeat an Umayyad army near Tours, France.
year.680: is the year that The Battle of Karbala marks the martyrdom of Husayn ibn Ali.
year.19: is the year that The Roman general Germanicus dies near Antioch. He was convinced that the mysterious illness that ended in his death was a result of poisoning by the Syrian governor Gnaeus Calpurnius Piso, whom he had ordered to leave the province.
year.1406: is the year that Chen Yanxiang, the only person from Indonesia known to have visited dynastic Korea, reaches Seoul after having set out from Java four months before.
year.633: is the year that Battle of Hatfield Chase: King Edwin of Northumbria is defeated and killed by an alliance under Penda of Mercia and Cadwallon of Gwynedd.
year.-539: is the year that The army of Cyrus the Great of Persia conquer Babylon, ending the Babylonian empire. (Julian calendar)
year.1269: is the year that The present church building at Westminster Abbey is consecrated.
year.409: is the year that Vandals and Alans cross the Pyrenees and appear in Hispania.
year.54: is the year that Roman emperor Claudius dies from poisoning under mysterious circumstances. He is succeeded by his adopted son Nero, rather than by Britannicus, his son with Messalina.
year.1211: is the year that Battle of the Rhyndacus: The Latin emperor Henry of Flanders defeats the Nicaean emperor Theodore I Laskaris.
year.1384: is the year that Jadwiga is crowned King of Poland, although she is a woman.
year.912: is the year that Abd ar-Rahman III becomes the eighth Emir of Córdoba.
year.690: is the year that Empress Wu Zetian ascends to the throne of the Tang dynasty and proclaims herself ruler of the Chinese Empire.
year.456: is the year that Ricimer defeats Avitus at Piacenza and becomes master of the Western Roman Empire.
year.1448: is the year that An Ottoman army defeats a Hungarian army at the Second Battle of Kosovo.
year.1166: is the year that Michael the Syrian, one of the most important Syriac historians, is consecrated as Syriac Orthodox Patriarch at the Mor Bar Sauma Monastery.
year.629: is the year that Dagobert I is crowned King of the Franks.
year.614: is the year that King Chlothar II promulgates the Edict of Paris (Edictum Chlotacharii), a sort of Frankish Magna Carta that defends the rights of the Frankish nobles while it excludes Jews from all civil employment in the Frankish Kingdom.
year.33: is the year that Heartbroken by the deaths of her sons Nero and Drusus, and banished to the island of Pandateria by Tiberius, Agrippina the Elder dies of self-inflicted starvation.
year.1466: is the year that The Thirteen Years' War between Poland and the Teutonic Order ends with the Second Treaty of Thorn.
year.439: is the year that The Vandals, led by King Gaiseric, take Carthage in North Africa.
year.310: is the year that Sixty-five days after being exiled by the Emperor Maxentius to Sicily, Pope Eusebius dies.
year.502: is the year that The Synodus Palmaris, called by Gothic king Theoderic, absolves Pope Symmachus of all charges, thus ending the schism of Antipope Laurentius.
year.-4004: is the year that James Ussher's purported creation date of the world according to the Bible.
year.1147: is the year that Seljuk Turks defeat German crusaders under Conrad III at the Battle of Dorylaeum.
year.1341: is the year that The Byzantine civil war of 1341–1347 formally begins with the proclamation of John VI Kantakouzenos as Byzantine Emperor.
year.312: is the year that Constantine the Great is said to have received his famous Vision of the Cross.
year.97: is the year that Roman emperor Nerva is forced by the Praetorian Guard to adopt general Marcus Ulpius Trajanus as his heir and successor.
year.437: is the year that Valentinian III, Western Roman Emperor, marries Licinia Eudoxia, daughter of his cousin Theodosius II, Eastern Roman Emperor in Constantinople unifying the two branches of the House of Theodosius.
year.758: is the year that Guangzhou is sacked by Arab and Persian pirates.
year.130: is the year that Emperor Hadrian establishes the city of Antinoöpolis on the Nile in honour of his companion Antinous, creating a new Hellenizing foundation in Roman Egypt.
year.802: is the year that Empress Irene is deposed and banished to Lesbos. Conspirators place Nikephoros, the minister of finance, on the Byzantine throne.
year.1468: is the year that Liège is sacked by Charles I of Burgundy's troops.
year.1090: is the year that The Rouen Riot, an attempt by English king William Rufus to take possession of Rouen, the capital city of his brother Robert, duke of Normandy, fails.
year.361: is the year that Emperor Constantius II dies of a fever at Mopsuestia in Cilicia; on his deathbed he is baptised and declares his cousin Julian rightful successor.
year.447: is the year that A powerful earthquake destroys large portions of the Walls of Constantinople, including 57 towers.
year.921: is the year that Treaty of Bonn: The Frankish kings Charles the Simple and Henry the Fowler sign a peace treaty or 'pact of friendship' (amicitia) to recognize their borders along the Rhine.
year.335: is the year that Athanasius, 20th pope of Alexandria, is banished to Trier on the charge that he prevented a grain fleet from sailing to Constantinople.
year.1372: is the year that Trần Duệ Tông succeeds his brother Trần Nghệ Tông as King of Vietnam.
year.1330: is the year that At the Battle of Posada, Basarab I of Wallachia defeats the Hungarian army of Charles I Robert.
year.694: is the year that At the Seventeenth Council of Toledo, Egica, a king of the Visigoths of Hispania, accuses Jews of aiding Muslims, sentencing all Jews to slavery.
year.937: is the year that Ten Kingdoms: Li Bian usurps the throne and deposes Emperor Yang Pu. The Wu State is replaced by Li (now called "Xu Zhigao"), who becomes the first ruler of Southern Tang.
year.1750: is the year that Riots break out in Lhasa after the murder of the Tibetan regent.
