year.1028: is the year that Constantine VIII dies, ending his uninterrupted reign as emperor or co-emperor of the Byzantine Empire of 66 years.
year.308: is the year that At Carnuntum, Emperor emeritus Diocletian confers with Galerius, Augustus of the East, and Maximianus, the recently returned former Augustus of the West, in an attempt to end the civil wars of the Tetrarchy.
year.1439: is the year that Plymouth becomes the first town incorporated by the English Parliament.
year.954: is the year that The 13-year-old Lothair III is crowned at the Abbey of Saint-Remi as king of the West Frankish Kingdom.
year.1160: is the year that Louis VII of France marries Adela of Champagne.
year.1093: is the year that Battle of Alnwick: in an English victory over the Scots, Malcolm III of Scotland, and his son Edward, are killed.
year.-332: is the year that Alexander the Great is crowned pharaoh of Egypt.
year.655: is the year that Battle of the Winwaed: Penda of Mercia is defeated by Oswiu of Northumbria.
year.1272: is the year that While travelling during the Ninth Crusade, Prince Edward becomes King of England upon Henry III of England's death, but he will not return to England for nearly two years to assume the throne.
year.1292: is the year that John Balliol becomes King of Scotland.
year.887: is the year that Emperor Charles the Fat is deposed by the Frankish magnates in an assembly at Frankfurt, leading his nephew, Arnulf of Carinthia, to declare himself king of the East Frankish Kingdom in late November.
year.1210: is the year that Pope Innocent III excommunicates Holy Roman Emperor Otto IV for invading the Kingdom of Sicily after promising to recognize papal control over it.
year.1105: is the year that Maginulfo is elected Antipope Sylvester IV in opposition to Pope Paschal II.
year.1095: is the year that The Council of Clermont begins: called by Pope Urban II, it led to the First Crusade to the Holy Land.
year.401: is the year that The Visigoths, led by king Alaric I, cross the Alps and invade northern Italy.
year.326: is the year that The old St. Peter's Basilica is consecrated by Pope Sylvester I.
year.1441: is the year that The Peace of Cremona ends the war between the Republic of Venice and the Duchy of Milan, after the victorious Venetian enterprise of military engineering of the Galeas per montes.
year.284: is the year that Diocletian is chosen as Roman emperor.
year.-164: is the year that Judas Maccabeus, son of Mattathias of the Hasmonean family, rededicates the Temple in Jerusalem, an event that is commemorated each year by the festival of Hanukkah. (25 Kislev 3597 in the Hebrew calendar.)
year.498: is the year that After the death of Anastasius II, Symmachus is elected Pope in the Lateran Palace, while Laurentius is elected Pope in Santa Maria Maggiore.
year.-534: is the year that Thespis of Icaria becomes the first recorded actor to portray a character on stage.
year.1177: is the year that Baldwin IV of Jerusalem and Raynald of Châtillon defeat Saladin at the Battle of Montgisard.
year.1034: is the year that Máel Coluim mac Cináeda, King of Scots, dies. His grandson, Donnchad, son of Bethóc and Crínán of Dunkeld, inherits the throne.
year.-571: is the year that Servius Tullius, king of Rome, celebrates the first of his three triumphs for his victory over the Etruscans.
year.1161: is the year that Battle of Caishi: A Song dynasty fleet fights a naval engagement with Jin dynasty ships on the Yangtze river during the Jin–Song Wars.
year.783: is the year that The Asturian queen Adosinda is held at a monastery to prevent her nephew from retaking the throne from Mauregatus.
year.602: is the year that Byzantine Emperor Maurice is forced to watch as the usurper Phocas executes his five sons before Maurice is beheaded himself.
year.511: is the year that King Clovis I dies at Lutetia and is buried in the Abbey of St Genevieve.
year.176: is the year that Emperor Marcus Aurelius grants his son Commodus the rank of "Imperator" and makes him Supreme Commander of the Roman legions.
year.587: is the year that Treaty of Andelot: King Guntram of Burgundy recognizes Childebert II as his heir.
year.1114: is the year that A large earthquake damages the areas of the Crusaders in the Middle East. Antioch, Mamistra, Marash and Edessa are hit by the shocks.
year.903: is the year that The Abbasid army under Muhammad ibn Sulayman al-Katib defeats the Qarmatians at the Battle of Hama.
year.561: is the year that Following the death of King Chlothar I at Compiègne, his four sons, Charibert I, Guntram, Sigebert I and Chilperic I, divide the Frankish Kingdom.
year.528: is the year that Antioch suffers its second major earthquake in two years, killing thousands and destroying its remaining edifice.
year.978: is the year that Franco-German war of 978–980: Holy Roman Emperor Otto II lifts the siege of Paris and withdraws.
year.883: is the year that Abu al Abbas celebrates a victory parade in Bagdhad following the surpression of the Zanj Rebellion, the largest slave revolt in the Arab world.
year.800: is the year that A council is convened in the Vatican, at which Charlemagne is to judge the accusations against Pope Leo III.
year.915: is the year that Pope John X crowns Berengar I of Italy as Holy Roman Emperor (probable date).
year.1623: is the year that 50 Christians are executed in Edo, Japan, during the Great Martyrdom of Edo.
year.1110: is the year that An army led by Baldwin I of Jerusalem and Sigurd the Crusader of Norway captures Sidon at the end of the First Crusade.
year.771: is the year that Austrasian king Carloman I dies, leaving his brother Charlemagne as sole king of the Frankish Kingdom.
year.1408: is the year that Seeking to resubjugate Muscovy, Emir Edigu of the Golden Horde reaches Moscow, burning areas around the city but failing to take the city itself.
year.1082: is the year that Ramon Berenguer II, Count of Barcelona is assassinated, most likely by his brother, Berenguer Ramon II.
year.1033: is the year that The Jordan Rift Valley earthquake destroys multiple cities across the Levant, triggers a tsunami and kills many.
year.-63: is the year that Cicero gives the fourth and final of the Catiline Orations.
year.574: is the year that Byzantine Emperor Justin II, suffering recurring seizures of insanity, adopts his general Tiberius and proclaims him as Caesar.
year.877: is the year that Louis the Stammerer (son of Charles the Bald) is crowned king of the West Frankish Kingdom at Compiègne.
year.757: is the year that The poet Du Fu returns to Chang'an as a member of Emperor Xuanzong's court, after having escaped the city during the An Lushan Rebellion.
year.835: is the year that Sweet Dew Incident: Emperor Wenzong of the Tang dynasty conspires to kill the powerful eunuchs of the Tang court, but the plot is foiled.
year.557: is the year that Constantinople is severely damaged by an earthquake, which cracks the dome of Hagia Sophia.
year.1025: is the year that Constantine VIII becomes sole emperor of the Byzantine Empire, 63 years after being crowned co-emperor.
year.687: is the year that Pope Sergius I is elected as a compromise between antipopes Paschal and Theodore.
year.1490: is the year that Anne, Duchess of Brittany, is married to Maximilian I, Holy Roman Emperor by proxy.
year.1154: is the year that Henry II of England is crowned at Westminster Abbey.
year.944: is the year that Byzantine Emperor Romanos I Lekapenos is arrested by two of his sons, forced to abdicate and to live as a monk for the rest of his life.
year.1361: is the year that The Battle of Linuesa is fought in the context of the Spanish Reconquista between the forces of the Emirate of Granada and the combined army of the Kingdom of Castile and of Jaén resulting in a Castilian victory.
year.583: is the year that Maya queen Yohl Ik'nal is crowned ruler of Palenque.
year.759: is the year that Tang dynasty poet Du Fu departs for Chengdu, where he is hosted by fellow poet Pei Di.
year.1013: is the year that Sweyn Forkbeard takes control of the Danelaw and is proclaimed king of England.
year.820: is the year that Eastern Emperor Leo V is murdered in a church of the Great Palace of Constantinople by followers of Michael II.
year.597: is the year that Augustine of Canterbury and his fellow-labourers baptise in Kent more than 10,000 Anglo-Saxons.
year.508: is the year that Clovis I, king of the Franks, is baptized into the Catholic faith at Reims, by Saint Remigius.
year.336: is the year that First documented sign of Christmas celebration in Rome.
year.333: is the year that Roman Emperor Constantine the Great elevates his youngest son Constans to the rank of Caesar.
year.274: is the year that A temple to Sol Invictus is dedicated in Rome by Emperor Aurelian.
year.36: is the year that Forces of Emperor Guangwu of the Eastern Han, under the command of Wu Han, conquer the separatist Chengjia empire, reuniting China.
year.795: is the year that Election of Pope Leo III.
year.893: is the year that An earthquake destroys the city of Dvin, Armenia.
year.418: is the year that A papal election begins, resulting in the election of Pope Boniface I.
year.999: is the year that Battle of Glenmama: The combined forces of Munster and Meath under king Brian Boru inflict a crushing defeat on the allied armies of Leinster and Dublin near Lyons Hill in Ireland.
year.534: is the year that The second and final edition of the Code of Justinian comes into effect in the Byzantine Empire.
year.535: is the year that Byzantine general Belisarius completes the conquest of Sicily, defeating the Gothic garrison of Palermo (Panormos), and ending his consulship for the year.
year.406: is the year that Vandals, Alans and Suebians cross the Rhine, beginning an invasion of Gaul.
